<html lang="pt-BR"><head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Armazém do Criador — Gestão</title>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#f5f4f0;--surface:#fff;--s2:#f0efe9;--border:#e2e0d8;
  --text:#1a1a18;--t2:#6b6a64;--t3:#9e9d96;
  --green:#2d6a2d;--gbg:#eaf2ea;
  --red:#a32020;--rbg:#fceaea;
  --amber:#7a4f00;--abg:#fef3dc;
  --blue:#1a4f8a;--bbg:#e8f0fb;
  --purple:#4a3a9a;--pbg:#eeecfb;
  --brand:#f5c800;--brand2:#2d8c5a;
  --r:10px;--rs:6px;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5}

header{background:#1a3a25;color:#fff;padding:10px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px}
.hlogo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.hlogo img{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid var(--brand)}
.hname{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.2px}
.hname small{display:block;font-size:10px;font-weight:400;color:#aed4bc;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase}
.hperiod{font-size:11px;color:#aed4bc;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px}

nav{background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 24px;display:flex;gap:2px;overflow-x:auto}
nav button{background:none;border:none;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;padding:11px 15px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:500;color:var(--t2);white-space:nowrap;transition:.15s}
nav button:hover{color:var(--text)}
nav button.active{color:var(--brand2);border-bottom-color:var(--brand2)}

main{max-width:1300px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px 24px}
.page{display:none}.page.active{display:block}

.kpi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px}
.kpi{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:14px 16px}
.kpi.green{border-top:3px solid var(--green)}.kpi.red{border-top:3px solid var(--red)}.kpi.amber{border-top:3px solid #c87f00}.kpi.blue{border-top:3px solid var(--blue)}
.kpi .lbl{font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:5px}
.kpi .val{font-size:22px;font-weight:600;line-height:1}
.kpi.green .val{color:var(--green)}.kpi.red .val{color:var(--red)}.kpi.amber .val{color:var(--amber)}
.kpi .sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);margin-top:4px}

.card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:16px;margin-bottom:16px}
.ctitle{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--t2);margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.two-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}

table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px}
th{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--t3);padding:7px 9px;background:var(--s2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);text-align:left;white-space:nowrap}
td{padding:7px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:middle}
tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
tr:hover td{background:#fafaf7}
.num{text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
.pname{font-weight:500;font-size:12px}
.pcode{font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);font-family:monospace}

.badge{display:inline-block;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px}
.bA{background:var(--gbg);color:var(--green)}.bB{background:var(--abg);color:var(--amber)}.bC{background:var(--s2);color:var(--t2)}
.b-ok{background:var(--gbg);color:var(--green)}.b-warn{background:var(--abg);color:var(--amber)}.b-crit{background:var(--rbg);color:var(--red)}.b-pend{background:var(--s2);color:var(--t2)}

.mbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.mbar-bg{width:56px;height:5px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.mbar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px}

.row-alert td{background:#fff8f8}.row-warn td{background:#fffdf5}.row-good td{background:#f8fff8}

.ch-200{position:relative;height:200px}.ch-240{position:relative;height:240px}.ch-300{position:relative;height:300px}
.legend{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--t2)}
.legend span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.legend i{display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px}

.filter-bar{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.filter-bar select,.filter-bar input[type=text]{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:6px 9px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text)}
.filter-bar input[type=text]{flex:1;min-width:160px;max-width:280px}
.filter-bar input[type=number]{width:76px;padding:5px 8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);font-size:12px;color:var(--text);text-align:center}

.btn{border:none;border-radius:var(--rs);padding:6px 13px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer}
.btn-green{background:var(--green);color:#fff}.btn-green:hover{background:#225222}
.btn-sm{padding:4px 9px;font-size:11px}

@media(max-width:768px){.two-col{grid-template-columns:1fr}main{padding:12px}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="hlogo">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Logo Armazém do Criador">
    <div class="hname">Armazém do Criador<small>Painel de Gestão</small></div>
  </div>
  <div class="hperiod">Jun/2025 – Mai/2026</div>
  <button onclick="salvarDashboard()" style="margin-left:auto;background:#2d6a2d;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">💾 Salvar</button>
</header>

<nav>
  <button class="" onclick="goTab('visao',this)">Visão Geral</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('vendas',this)" class="">Vendas &amp; Produtos</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('margem',this)" class="">Margens</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('estoque',this)" class="">Estoque &amp; Alertas</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('reposicao',this)" class="">🛒 Reposição</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('mensal',this)" class="">📅 Evolução Mensal</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('estoque-tab',this)" class="">📦 Estoque Atual</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('compras',this)" class="">🏪 Plano de Compras</button>
  <button onclick="goTab('saidas',this)" class="active">📊 Análise de Saídas</button>
</nav>

<main>

<!-- ====== VISÃO GERAL ====== -->
<div id="tab-visao" class="page">
  <div class="kpi-grid">
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="lbl">Faturamento 12m</div><div class="val">R$ 945,6K</div><div class="sub">Jun/25 – Mai/26</div></div>
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="lbl">Lucro bruto</div><div class="val">R$ 250,7K</div><div class="sub">Margem média 34,6%</div></div>
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="lbl">Custo total</div><div class="val">R$ 695,1K</div><div class="sub">73,5% da receita</div></div>
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="lbl">Itens vendidos</div><div class="val">197.302</div><div class="sub">668 SKUs ativos</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="lbl">Produtos inativos</div><div class="val" id="vgInativos">276</div><div class="sub" id="vgInativosSub">25% do catálogo</div></div>
    <div class="kpi red"><div class="lbl">Estoque negativo</div><div class="val" id="vgNegativos">8</div><div class="sub">Baixas não lançadas</div></div>
    <div class="kpi red"><div class="lbl">Preço invertido</div><div class="val" id="vgInvertido">0</div><div class="sub">Custo &gt; venda</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="two-col">
    <div class="card"><div class="ctitle">Faturamento por categoria</div><div class="ch-240"><canvas id="cFat" role="img" aria-label="Faturamento por categoria" width="730" height="300" style="display: block; box-sizing: border-box; height: 240px; width: 584px;"></canvas></div><div class="legend" id="legFat"><span><i style="background:#1a4f8a"></i>CÃO: 42.4%</span><span><i style="background:#2d6a2d"></i>GATO: 39.5%</span><span><i style="background:#4a3a9a"></i>PÁSSAROS: 11.5%</span><span><i style="background:#7a4f00"></i>MEDICAMENTOS: 3.2%</span><span><i style="background:#a32020"></i>CAVALO: 1.9%</span><span><i style="background:#1a6e6e"></i>PRAGAS: 0.8%</span><span><i style="background:#7a3a70"></i>COELHO: 0.2%</span><span><i style="background:#3a5a7a"></i>HAMSTER: 0.2%</span></div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="ctitle">Margem de lucro por categoria (%)</div><div class="ch-240"><canvas id="cMarg" role="img" aria-label="Margem por categoria" width="730" height="300" style="display: block; box-sizing: border-box; height: 240px; width: 584px;"></canvas></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="two-col">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="ctitle">Curva ABC — participação no faturamento</div>
      <div class="ch-200"><canvas id="cABC" role="img" aria-label="Curva ABC" width="730" height="250" style="display: block; box-sizing: border-box; height: 200px; width: 584px;"></canvas></div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:12px">
        <div style="background:var(--s2);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:10px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">Curva A</div><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green)">129</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3)">80% fat. — R$ 755K</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--s2);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:10px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">Curva B</div><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--amber)">162</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3)">15% fat. — R$ 142K</div></div>
        <div style="background:var(--s2);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:10px;text-align:center"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">Curva C</div><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--t2)">377</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3)">5% fat. — R$ 47K</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card"><div class="ctitle">Top subcategorias por lucro bruto</div><div class="ch-240"><canvas id="cSubcat" role="img" aria-label="Lucro por subcategoria" width="730" height="300" style="display: block; box-sizing: border-box; height: 240px; width: 584px;"></canvas></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ====== VENDAS ====== -->
<div id="tab-vendas" class="page">
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <select id="vfCat" onchange="renderTop()"><option value="">Todas as categorias</option><option>CÃO</option><option>GATO</option><option>PASSAROS</option><option>MEDICAMENTOS</option><option>CAVALO</option><option>PRAGAS</option></select>
    <select id="vfCurva" onchange="renderTop()"><option value="">Todas as curvas</option><option>A</option><option>B</option><option>C</option></select>
    <input type="text" id="vfBusca" placeholder="Buscar produto..." oninput="renderTop()">
    <span id="vCount" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t3)">20 produtos</span>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:auto">
    <table><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Produto</th><th>Cat.</th><th class="num">Faturamento</th><th class="num">Lucro</th><th class="num">Margem</th><th>Curva</th></tr></thead><tbody id="topBody">
    <tr class="row-alert">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">1</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO SACA PROVENCE RAÇAS GRANDES 20 KG</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 33.004</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 3.676</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:600">11.0%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">2</td>
      <td><div class="pname">AREIA GATO CLASSIC</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 29.624</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 9.104</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">32.8%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">3</td>
      <td><div class="pname">SACHÉ FRISKIES MIX</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 29.522</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 7.473</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">25.0%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">4</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL FRISKIES FRUTOS DO MAR</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 17.895</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 3.703</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">20.7%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">5</td>
      <td><div class="pname">SACHÉ WHISKAS MIX</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 17.691</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 3.918</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">22.1%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">6</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL PROVENCE CAT CASTRADO</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 16.642</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 4.980</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">30.0%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">7</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL PROVENCE ADULTO RAÇAS GRANDES</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 15.831</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 4.685</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">29.6%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-good">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">8</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL PERIQUITO</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a">PÁSSAROS</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 15.020</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 6.435</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:#2d6a2d;font-weight:600">42.8%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">9</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL PREMIER ADULTO RAÇAS PEQUENAS</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 14.381</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 4.407</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">30.7%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">10</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL EVOLUT CAT CASTRADO</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 13.464</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 3.451</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">25.6%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">11</td>
      <td><div class="pname">SACHÉ DOGSHOW MIX</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 12.229</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 2.774</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">23.2%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">12</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO SACA PROVENCE CAT CASTRADO 10KG</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 12.036</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 2.127</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">17.5%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-good">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">13</td>
      <td><div class="pname">AREIA GATO FINÍSSIMA PERFUMADA</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 11.888</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 4.825</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:#2d6a2d;font-weight:600">41.7%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-alert">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">14</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO SACA DOGSHOW ADULTO PP 20KG</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 11.323</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 1.389</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:600">11.9%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">15</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL FRISKIES CARNE</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 10.975</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 2.271</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">20.7%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">16</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO SACA CAPITÃO DOG 14KG</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 10.375</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 1.900</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">18.1%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">17</td>
      <td><div class="pname">SACHÉ PEDIGREE MIX</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 9.680</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 1.777</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">18.7%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">18</td>
      <td><div class="pname">RAÇÃO GRANEL GRANPLUS GATO CASTRADO</div></td>
      <td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td>
      <td class="num">R$ 9.620</td>
      <td class="num">R$ 2.771</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">28.7%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge bA">A</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="">

<!-- ====== REPOSIÇÃO ====== -->
<div id="tab-reposicao" class="page">
  <div class="kpi-grid">
    <div class="kpi red"><div class="lbl">Valor total a repor</div><div class="val" id="rKpiValor">R$ 26.385</div><div class="sub">Custo estimado de compra</div></div>
    <div class="kpi red"><div class="lbl">🔴 Crítico</div><div class="val" id="rKpiCrit">145</div><div class="sub">Comprar hoje</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="lbl">🟡 Urgente</div><div class="val" id="rKpiUrg">9</div><div class="sub">Esta semana</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="lbl">🟠 Pedir já</div><div class="val" id="rKpiPj">13</div><div class="sub">Próximos dias</div></div>
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="lbl">Total itens</div><div class="val" id="rKpiTotal">201 itens</div><div class="sub">Precisam reposição</div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="card" style="background:#f0f7f0;border-color:#b8d8b8;margin-bottom:14px">
    <div class="ctitle" style="color:var(--green)">⚙️ Parâmetros — ajuste conforme sua realidade</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">
      <div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:4px">Lead time fornecedor (dias)</div><input type="number" id="pLT" value="5" min="1" max="30" oninput="recalcular()"></div>
      <div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:4px">Cobertura após entrega (dias)</div><input type="number" id="pCob" value="30" min="7" max="90" oninput="recalcular()"></div>
      <div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:4px">Estoque de segurança (dias)</div><input type="number" id="pSaf" value="7" min="1" max="30" oninput="recalcular()"></div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:9px 13px;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--t2)">
        <strong style="display:block;font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:2px">Fórmula</strong>
        Ponto de pedido = Venda/dia × (Lead time + Segurança)<br>
        Qtd. comprar = Estoque ideal − Estoque atual<br>
        Estoque ideal = Venda/dia × (Lead time + Cobertura + Segurança)
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-green btn-sm" onclick="exportRep()">⬇️ Exportar pedido CSV</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="two-col" style="margin-bottom:14px">
    <div class="card"><div class="ctitle">Reposição por categoria (R$)</div><div class="ch-200"><canvas id="rCatChart" role="img" aria-label="Reposição por categoria" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 0px; width: 0px;" width="0" height="0"></canvas></div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="ctitle">Distribuição por urgência</div><div class="ch-200"><canvas id="rUrgChart" role="img" aria-label="Urgência reposição" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 0px; width: 0px;" width="0" height="0"></canvas></div><div class="legend" id="rUrgLeg" style="justify-content:center;margin-top:8px"><span><i style="background:#a32020"></i>Crítico: R$ 15.373</span><span><i style="background:#c87f00"></i>Urgente: R$ 3.176</span><span><i style="background:#d48000"></i>Pedir já: R$ 2.088</span><span><i style="background:#1a4f8a"></i>Normal: R$ 5.749</span></div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="filter-bar">
    <select id="rfCat" onchange="renderRep()"><option value="">Todas as categorias</option><option>CÃO</option><option>GATO</option><option>PASSAROS</option><option>MEDICAMENTOS</option><option>CAVALO</option><option>PRAGAS</option></select>
    <select id="rfUrg" onchange="renderRep()"><option value="">Todas as urgências</option><option value="Crítico">🔴 Crítico</option><option value="Urgente">🟡 Urgente</option><option value="Pedir já">🟠 Pedir já</option><option value="Normal">🔵 Normal</option></select>
    <input type="text" id="rfBusca" placeholder="Buscar produto..." oninput="renderRep()">
    <span id="rCount" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t3)">201 produtos — R$ 26.385</span>
  </div>

<!-- ====== EVOLUÇÃO MENSAL ====== -->
<div id="tab-mensal" class="page">

  <!-- IMPORT CARD -->
  <div class="card" style="background:#f0f7f0;border-color:#b8d8b8;margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="card-title" style="color:var(--green)">📥 Atualizar dados mensais — importar relatório do Market Up</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <div id="mDrop" onclick="document.getElementById('mFile').click()" ondragover="this.style.borderColor='#2d6a2d';event.preventDefault()" ondragleave="this.style.borderColor='#b8d8b8'" ondrop="mHandleDrop(event)" style="flex:1;min-width:180px;background:var(--surface2);border:2px dashed #b8d8b8;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s">
        <div style="font-size:24px">📊</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px">Clique ou arraste o arquivo .xls / .xlsx</div>
        <input type="file" id="mFile" accept=".xls,.xlsx,.csv" style="display:none" onchange="mHandleFile(this)">
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.9">
        <strong>Como exportar do Market Up:</strong><br>
        Relatórios → Vendas por produto → Período mensal<br>
        Exportar como Excel (.xls ou .xlsx)
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="mMsg" style="display: block; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgb(232, 240, 251); color: rgb(26, 79, 138);">Importado — 13 meses. Mês atual parcial (21/30 dias) — último mês projetado para o mês completo (×1.43)</div>
    <div id="mAvisoParcial" style="display: block; margin-top: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; background: rgb(255, 248, 225); color: rgb(122, 79, 0); border: 1px solid rgb(240, 192, 64);">⚠️ Mês atual parcial (21/30 dias) — último mês projetado para o mês completo (×1.43)</div>
  </div>

  <!-- KPIs -->
  <div class="kpi-grid" id="mKpis">
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="kpi-label">Faturamento 12m</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkFat">R$ 1029.5K</div><div class="kpi-sub">Total acumulado</div></div>
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="kpi-label">Lucro bruto 12m</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkLucro">R$ 274.3K</div><div class="kpi-sub">Após custos diretos</div></div>
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="kpi-label">Média mensal</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkMedia">R$ 79.2K</div><div class="kpi-sub">Faturamento/mês</div></div>
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="kpi-label">Margem média</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkMargMedia">26.7%</div><div class="kpi-sub">12 meses</div></div>
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="kpi-label">Melhor mês</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkMelhor">Dez/de 25</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="mkMelhorSub">R$ 88.2K</div></div>
    <div class="kpi red"><div class="kpi-label">Menor mês</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkPior">Fev/de 26</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="mkPiorSub">R$ 71.4K</div></div>
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="kpi-label">Melhor margem</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkMargMes">Mar/de 26</div><div class="kpi-sub" id="mkMargSub">29.5%</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="kpi-label">Crescimento</div><div class="kpi-val" id="mkCresc" style="color: var(--red);">-27.3%</div><div class="kpi-sub">1º vs último mês</div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- FAT + LUCRO -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Faturamento e lucro bruto por mês</div>
    <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="cMFat" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 280px; width: 1218px;" width="1523" height="350"></canvas></div>
  </div>

  <!-- MARGEM + ITENS -->
  <div class="two-col">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title">Evolução da margem de lucro (%)</div>
      <div style="position:relative;height:220px"><canvas id="cMMarg" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 220px; width: 584px;" width="730" height="275"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title">Itens vendidos por mês</div>
      <div style="position:relative;height:220px"><canvas id="cMQtd" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 220px; width: 584px;" width="730" height="275"></canvas></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CAT STACKED -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Faturamento por categoria — evolução mensal</div>
    <div style="position:relative;height:280px"><canvas id="cMCat" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 280px; width: 1218px;" width="1523" height="350"></canvas></div>
    <div class="legend" id="mCatLeg" style="margin-top:10px"><span><i style="background:#1a4f8a"></i>CÃO</span><span><i style="background:#2d6a2d"></i>GATO</span><span><i style="background:#7f77dd"></i>PASSAROS</span><span><i style="background:#c87f00"></i>MEDICAMENTOS</span><span><i style="background:#a32020"></i>CAVALO</span><span><i style="background:#1a6e6e"></i>PRAGAS</span></div>
  </div>

  <!-- MARGEM POR CATEGORIA -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Margem por categoria ao longo dos meses (%)</div>
    <div style="position:relative;height:260px"><canvas id="cMCatMarg" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 260px; width: 1218px;" width="1523" height="325"></canvas></div>
    <div class="legend" id="mCatMargLeg" style="margin-top:10px"><span><i style="background:#1a4f8a"></i>CÃO</span><span><i style="background:#2d6a2d"></i>GATO</span><span><i style="background:#7f77dd"></i>PASSAROS</span><span><i style="background:#c87f00"></i>MEDICAMENTOS</span><span><i style="background:#a32020"></i>CAVALO</span><span><i style="background:#1a6e6e"></i>PRAGAS</span></div>
  </div>

  <!-- TOP 5 POR MÊS -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Top 5 produtos do mês</div>
    <div class="filter-bar" style="margin-bottom:12px">
      <select id="mMesSel" onchange="renderMTop()" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text)"><option value="Jun/de 25">Jun/de 25</option><option value="Jul/de 25">Jul/de 25</option><option value="Ago/de 25">Ago/de 25</option><option value="Set/de 25">Set/de 25</option><option value="Out/de 25">Out/de 25</option><option value="Nov/de 25">Nov/de 25</option><option value="Dez/de 25">Dez/de 25</option><option value="Jan/de 26">Jan/de 26</option><option value="Fev/de 26">Fev/de 26</option><option value="Mar/de 26">Mar/de 26</option><option value="Abr/de 26">Abr/de 26</option><option value="Mai/de 26">Mai/de 26</option><option value="Jun/de 26">Jun/de 26</option></select>
    </div>
    <table>
      <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Produto</th><th>Cat.</th><th class="num">Faturamento</th><th class="num">Lucro</th><th class="num">Margem</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="mTopBody"><tr><td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">1</td><td style="font-weight:500;font-size:12px">SACHE FRISKIES MIX</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td><td class="num">R$ 2.045</td><td class="num">R$ 515</td><td class="num" style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">25.2%</td></tr><tr><td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">2</td><td style="font-weight:500;font-size:12px">RAÇÃO SACA PROVENCE RAÇAS GRANDES 20 KG</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a">CÃO</span></td><td class="num">R$ 1.778</td><td class="num">R$ 207</td><td class="num" style="color:var(--red);font-weight:600">11.6%</td></tr><tr><td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">3</td><td style="font-weight:500;font-size:12px">RAÇÃO GRANEL PROVENCE CAT CASTRADO SALMÃO ATU</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td><td class="num">R$ 1.512</td><td class="num">R$ 483</td><td class="num" style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">31.9%</td></tr><tr><td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">4</td><td style="font-weight:500;font-size:12px">AREIA GATO CLASSIC</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td><td class="num">R$ 1.314</td><td class="num">R$ 423</td><td class="num" style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">32.2%</td></tr><tr><td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">5</td><td style="font-weight:500;font-size:12px">RAÇÃO GRANEL EVOLUT CAT CASTRADO ATUM E SALMA</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d">GATO</span></td><td class="num">R$ 1.060</td><td class="num">R$ 338</td><td class="num" style="color:inherit;font-weight:600">31.9%</td></tr></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- SUBCATEGORIAS -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Top subcategorias — faturamento acumulado 12m</div>
    <div style="position:relative;height:260px"><canvas id="cMSubcat" style="box-sizing: border-box; display: block; height: 260px; width: 1218px;" width="1523" height="325"></canvas></div>
  </div>

  <!-- TABELA COMPARATIVA -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Comparativo mês a mês — detalhado</div>
    <div style="overflow:auto">
    <table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Mês</th>
          <th class="num">Faturamento</th>
          <th class="num">Lucro</th>
          <th class="num">Margem</th>
          <th class="num">Itens</th>
          <th class="num">SKUs ativos</th>
          <th class="num">vs Mês anterior</th>
          <th class="num">Acumulado ano</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="mComparBody"><tr class=""><td><strong>Jun/de 25</strong></td><td class="num">R$ 79.298</td><td class="num">R$ 18.287</td><td class="num" </div>

<!-- ====== ESTOQUE ATUAL ====== -->
<div id="tab-estoque-tab" class="page">

  <!-- IMPORT CARD -->
  <div class="card" style="background:#f0f7f0;border-color:#b8d8b8;margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="card-title" style="color:var(--green)">📥 Importar estoque atualizado do Market Up</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <div id="esDrop" onclick="document.getElementById('esFile').click()" ondragover="this.style.borderColor='#2d6a2d';event.preventDefault()" ondragleave="this.style.borderColor='#b8d8b8'" ondrop="esHandleDrop(event)" style="flex:1;min-width:180px;background:var(--surface2);border:2px dashed #b8d8b8;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer">
        <div style="font-size:24px">📦</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px">Clique ou arraste o arquivo de produtos .xlsx</div>
        <input type="file" id="esFile" accept=".xls,.xlsx,.csv" style="display:none" onchange="esHandleFile(this)">
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.9">
        <strong>Exportar do Market Up:</strong><br>
        Produtos → Exportar → Excel<br>
        Incluir: Código de Barras, Descrição,<br>
        Quantidade em Estoque, Estoque mínimo,<br>
        Preço de Custo, Categoria
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="esMsg" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- KPIs -->
  <div class="kpi-grid">
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="kpi-label">Valor total em estoque</div><div class="kpi-val" id="esKpiValor">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">Custo total</div></div>
    <div class="kpi red"><div class="kpi-label">Estoque negativo</div><div class="kpi-val" id="esKpiNeg">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">Baixas não lançadas</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="kpi-label">Zerados</div><div class="kpi-val" id="esKpiZer">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">Sem estoque</div></div>
    <div class="kpi red"><div class="kpi-label">Abaixo do mínimo</div><div class="kpi-val" id="esKpiMin">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">Risco de ruptura</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="kpi-label">Ruptura &lt; 7 dias</div><div class="kpi-val" id="esKpiRup">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">Urgente repor</div></div>
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="kpi-label">Total ativos</div><div class="kpi-val" id="esKpiAtivos">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">Com movimentação</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="kpi-label">Inativos</div><div class="kpi-val" id="esKpiInat">—</div><div class="kpi-sub">Desconsiderados nos KPIs</div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="two-col">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title">Valor do estoque por categoria (R$)</div>
      <canvas id="esCatChart" width="500" height="240"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title">Giro de estoque por categoria (Fat / Valor estoque)</div>
      <canvas id="esGiroChart" width="500" height="240"></canvas>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:8px">Giro = faturamento anual ÷ valor do estoque. Quanto maior, melhor — significa que o estoque roda mais rápido.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CRÍTICOS -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">🚨 Produtos críticos — risco de ruptura imediato</div>
    <div class="filter-bar" style="margin-bottom:12px">
      <select id="esFilterUrg" onchange="esRenderCrit()" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:6px 9px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text)">
        <option value="">Todos os alertas</option>
        <option value="Crítico">🔴 Crítico (negativo)</option>
        <option value="Urgente">🟡 Urgente (&lt;7 dias)</option>
        <option value="Atenção">🟠 Atenção (&lt;15 dias)</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <table>
      <thead><tr><th>Produto</th><th>Cat.</th><th class="num">Qtd. sistema</th><th class="num">Venda/dia</th><th class="num">Cobertura</th><th class="num">Fat. anual</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="esCritBody"></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- CATEGORIA DETAIL -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Análise por categoria — estoque vs faturamento</div>
    <div style="overflow:auto">
    <table>
      <thead><tr><th>Categoria</th><th class="num">Valor estoque</th><th class="num">Fat. anual</th><th class="num">Giro</th><th class="num">Negativos</th><th class="num">Zerados</th><th>Saúde</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="esCatBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ====== PLANO DE COMPRAS ====== -->
<div id="tab-compras" class="page">

  <!-- KPIs -->
  <div class="kpi-grid" id="pcKpiGrid"><div class="kpi red"><div class="lbl">💰 Valor total a comprar</div><div class="val">R$ 26.385</div><div class="sub">Estimativa de custo</div></div><div class="kpi amber"><div class="lbl">🏪 Fornecedores</div><div class="val">24</div><div class="sub">Com pedidos ativos</div></div><div class="kpi red"><div class="lbl">🔴 Itens críticos</div><div class="val">145</div><div class="sub">Comprar hoje</div></div><div class="kpi amber"><div class="lbl">🟡 Urgentes</div><div class="val">9</div><div class="sub">Esta semana</div></div><div class="kpi blue"><div class="lbl">📦 Total de itens</div><div class="val">201</div><div class="sub">Em 25 fornecedores</div></div></div>

  <!-- Filtros -->
  <div class="filter-bar" style="margin-bottom:14px">
    <select id="pcFiltForn" onchange="pcRender()"><option value="">Todos os fornecedores</option><option value="CENTRAL DAS RAÇÕES">CENTRAL DAS RAÇÕES</option><option value="NUTRIVALE FOOD">NUTRIVALE FOOD</option><option value="EBA DISTRIBUIDORA">EBA DISTRIBUIDORA</option><option value="NUTRANE CARPINA">NUTRANE CARPINA</option><option value="FOCUS">FOCUS</option><option value="ADIMAX - MAGNUS">ADIMAX - MAGNUS</option><option value="Bombado">Bombado</option><option value="SAMARIA">SAMARIA</option><option value="TRA DISTIBUIDORA LOGISTICA">TRA DISTIBUIDORA LOGISTICA</option><option value="galego">galego</option><option value="RURAL SHOP">RURAL SHOP</option><option value="DOG GRIFE">DOG GRIFE</option><option value="ÁGIL PET">ÁGIL PET</option><option value="ANTONIO RAÇÕES">ANTONIO RAÇÕES</option><option value="VOAPET">VOAPET</option><option value="FEIRA DO CORDEIRO">FEIRA DO CORDEIRO</option><option value="RECIFE DOCES">RECIFE DOCES</option><option value="CANDIDO PATO">CANDIDO PATO</option><option value="CANTORIA">CANTORIA</option><option value="GARRA ANIMAL">GARRA ANIMAL</option><option value="AGROMED">AGROMED</option><option value="ANA PAULA">ANA PAULA</option><option value="AZOIA">AZOIA</option><option value="FORNECEDOR ALEATORIO">FORNECEDOR ALEATORIO</option><option value="SEM FORNECEDOR">SEM FORNECEDOR</option></select>
    <select id="pcFiltUrg" onchange="pcRender()">
      <option value="">Todas as urgências</option>
      <option value="Crítico">🔴 Crítico</option>
      <option value="Urgente">🟡 Urgente</option>
      <option value="Pedir já">🟠 Pedir já</option>
      <option value="Normal">🔵 Normal</option>
    </select>
    <select id="pcFiltCat" onchange="pcRender()">
      <option value="">Todas as categorias</option>
      <option>CÃO</option><option>GATO</option><option>PASSAROS</option>
      <option>MEDICAMENTOS</option><option>CAVALO</option><option>PRAGAS</option>
    </select>
    <input type="text" id="pcBusca" placeholder="Buscar produto..." oninput="pcRender()" style="flex:1;min-width:160px;max-width:280px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:6px 9px;font-size:12px">
    <button class="btn btn-green btn-sm" onclick="pcExport()">⬇️ Exportar CSV</button>
    <span id="pcCount" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t3)">201 itens — R$ 26.385</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Cards por fornecedor -->
  <div id="pcCards"><div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px;padding:0;overflow:hidden"><div style="background:#f0f7f0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px"><span style="font-size:16px">🏪</span><div><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px">CENTRAL DAS RAÇÕES</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t2);margin-top:2px">6 itens &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:600">3 críticos</span></div></div></div><div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green)">R$ 3.784</div></div><div style="overflow:auto"><table><thead><tr><th>Urgência</th><th>Produto</th><th>Cat.</th><th class="num">Estoque</th><th class="num">Qtd. comprar</th><th class="num">Venda/dia</th><th <!-- ====== ANÁLISE DE SAÍDAS ====== -->
<div id="tab-saidas" class="page active">

  <!-- KPIs -->
  <div class="kpi-grid" id="svKpis" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="lbl">🏆 Maior Faturamento</div><div class="val" id="svKfat">R$ 35K</div><div class="sub" id="svKfatSub">RAÇÃO SACA PROVENCE RAÇAS GRANDES 20 KG</div></div>
    <div class="kpi blue"><div class="lbl">📦 Maior Volume</div><div class="val" id="svKqtd">11.257</div><div class="sub" id="svKqtdSub">SACHE FRISKIES MIX</div></div>
    <div class="kpi green"><div class="lbl">💹 Maior Margem</div><div class="val" id="svKmarg">63.5%</div><div class="sub" id="svKmargSub">PAIÇO AMARELO</div></div>
    <div class="kpi amber"><div class="lbl">🔍 Produtos encontrados</div><div class="val" id="svKcount">126</div><div class="sub">em 13 meses de histórico</div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros -->
  <div class="filter-bar" style="margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <input type="text" id="svBusca" placeholder="🔍 Buscar produto..." oninput="svRender()" style="flex:1;min-width:200px;max-width:340px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:8px 12px;font-size:13px;font-weight:500">
    <select id="svCat" onchange="svRender()" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text)">
      <option value="">Todas as categorias</option>
      <option>CÃO</option><option>GATO</option><option>PASSAROS</option>
      <option>MEDICAMENTOS</option><option>CAVALO</option><option>PRAGAS</option>
    </select>
    <select id="svOrd" onchange="svRender()" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text)">
      <option value="fat">Ordenar por Faturamento</option>
      <option value="qtd">Ordenar por Quantidade</option>
      <option value="marg">Ordenar por Margem</option>
      <option value="lucro">Ordenar por Lucro</option>
      <option value="az">A → Z</option>
    </select>
    <select id="svMesFilt" onchange="svRender()" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rs);padding:7px 10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text)">
      <option value="">Todos os meses</option>
    <option value="2025-06">25/06</option><option value="2025-07">25/07</option><option value="2025-08">25/08</option><option value="2025-09">25/09</option><option value="2025-10">25/10</option><option value="2025-11">25/11</option><option value="2025-12">25/12</option><option value="2026-01">26/01</option><option value="2026-02">26/02</option><option value="2026-03">26/03</option><option value="2026-04">26/04</option><option value="2026-05">26/05</option><option value="2026-06">26/06</option></select>
    <button class="btn btn-green btn-sm" onclick="svExport()">⬇️ Exportar CSV</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Tabela -->
  <div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
    <div style="overflow:auto">
      <table id="svTable">
        <thead>

            <th style="width:32px">#</th>

// Granel não se compra — vem da saca por composição. Excluir tudo com GRANEL no nome.
let REP_CALC = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(REP_DATA.rows.filter(r => !r.desc.toUpperCase().includes('GRANEL'))));

/* ---- UTILS ---- */
function fmt(n){ return 'R$ '+Math.round(n).toLocaleString('pt-BR'); }
function fmtK(n){ return n>=1000?'R$ '+(n/1000).toFixed(0)+'K':'R$ '+n; }
function mC(m){ return m>=35?var_green:m<15?'#a32020':'#5a5a50'; }
const var_green = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--green').trim()||'#2d6a2d';

function catBadge(c){
  const m={'CÃO':'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','GATO':'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d','PÁSSAROS':'background:#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','PASSAROS':'background:#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','MEDICAMENTOS':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','CAVALO':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  return `<span class="badge" style="${m[c]||'background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64'}">${c}</span>`;
}
function urgBadge(u){
  const m={'Crítico':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020','Urgente':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','Pedir já':'background:#fff3e0;color:#8a4a00','Normal':'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a'};
  return `<span class="badge" style="${m[u]||''}">${u}</span>`;
}
function cobC(d){ return d<=0?'#a32020':d<=5?'#a32020':d<=12?'#7a4f00':'#2d6a2d'; }

/* ---- TABS ---- */
function goTab(id, btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('tab-'+id).classList.add('active');
  btn.classList.add('active');
  if(id==='reposicao') recalcular();
  if(id==='compras') pcInit();
  if(id==='saidas') svInit();
  if(id==='mensal'){
    _mInited = false;
    Object.keys(_mCharts).forEach(function(k){ try{_mCharts[k].destroy();}catch(e){} });
    _mCharts = {};
    setTimeout(function(){ initMensalOnce(); }, 500);
  }
  if(id==='estoque-tab') setTimeout(esShowEstoque, 400);
}

/* ---- CHARTS ---- */
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
  // Cat faturamento
  const cFat = new Chart(document.getElementById('cFat'),{
    type:'doughnut',
    data:{labels:DATA.cats.map(c=>c[0]),datasets:[{data:DATA.cats.map(c=>c[1]),backgroundColor:COLORS,borderWidth:2,borderColor:'#fff'}]},
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:c=>' '+fmtK(c.raw)+' ('+DATA.cats[c.dataIndex][4]+'%)'}}}}
  });
  const leg=document.getElementById('legFat');
  DATA.cats.forEach((c,i)=>{ leg.innerHTML+=`<span><i style="background:${COLORS[i]}"></i>${c[0]}: ${c[4]}%</span>`; });

  // Cat margem
  new Chart(document.getElementById('cMarg'),{
    type:'bar',
    data:{labels:DATA.cats.map(c=>c[0]),datasets:[{data:DATA.cats.map(c=>c[3]),backgroundColor:DATA.cats.map(c=>c[3]>=35?'#2d6a2d':c[3]<25?'#c87f00':'#1a4f8a'),borderRadius:4}]},
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,indexAxis:'y',plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{ticks:{callback:v=>v+'%',font:{size:10},color:tc},grid:{color:gc}},y:{ticks:{font:{size:10},color:tc},grid:{display:false}}}}
  });

  // ABC donut
  new Chart(document.getElementById('cABC'),{
    type:'doughnut',
    data:{labels:['Curva A (129)','Curva B (162)','Curva C (377)'],datasets:[{data:[755736,142465,47399],backgroundColor:['#2d6a2d','#c87f00','#9e9d96'],borderWidth:2,borderColor:'#fff'}]},
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'68%',plugins:{legend:{display:false}}}
  });

  // Subcat lucro
  new Chart(document.getElementById('cSubcat'),{
    type:'bar',
    data:{labels:DATA.subcats.map(s=>s[0]+'/'+s[1]),datasets:[{data:DATA.subcats.map(s=>s[3]),backgroundColor:DATA.subcats.map((_,i)=>COLORS[i%COLORS.length]),borderRadius:4}]},
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{ticks:{font:{size:9},color:tc,maxRotation:30},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{callback:v=>'R$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K',font:{size:10},color:tc},grid:{color:gc}}}}
  });

  // Scatter
  const scData=DATA.top.map(r=>({x:r[2]/1000,y:r[4],label:r[0].substring(0,30)}));
  new Chart(document.getElementById('cScatter'),{
    type:'scatter',
    data:{datasets:[{data:scData,backgroundColor:scData.map(d=>d.y>=35?'rgba(45,106,45,.7)':d.y<15?'rgba(163,32,32,.7)':'rgba(26,79,138,.6)'),pointRadius:5}]},
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:c=>c.raw.label+': R$'+c.raw.x.toFixed(0)+'K / '+c.raw.y+'%'}}},scales:{x:{title:{display:true,text:'Faturamento (R$ mil)',font:{size:10},color:tc},ticks:{font:{size:9},color:tc,callback:v=>'R$'+v+'K'},grid:{color:gc}},y:{title:{display:true,text:'Margem (%)',font:{size:10},color:tc},ticks:{font:{size:9},color:tc,callback:v=>v+'%'},grid:{color:gc}}}}
  });

  // Render tables
  renderTop(); renderTables();
});

/* ---- TABLES ---- */
function renderTop(){
  const cat=document.getElementById('vfCat').value;
  const curva=document.getElementById('vfCurva').value;
  const q=document.getElementById('vfBusca').value.toLowerCase();
  const rows=DATA.top.filter(r=>(!cat||r[1]===cat||r[1]==='CÃO'&&cat==='CÃO')&&(!curva||r[5]===curva)&&(!q||r[0].toLowerCase().includes(q)));
  document.getElementById('vCount').textContent=rows.length+' produtos';
  document.getElementById('topBody').innerHTML=rows.map((r,i)=>`
    <tr class="${r[4]<15?'row-alert':r[4]>=40?'row-good':''}">
      <td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">${i+1}</td>
      <td><div class="pname">${r[0]}</div></td>
      <td>${catBadge(r[1])}</td>
      <td class="num">${fmt(r[2])}</td>
      <td class="num">${fmt(r[3])}</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:${r[4]>=35?'#2d6a2d':r[4]<15?'#a32020':'inherit'};font-weight:600">${r[4].toFixed(1)}%</span></td>
      <td><span class="badge b${r[5]}">${r[5]}</span></td>
    </tr>`).join('');
}

function renderTables(){
  document.getElementById('starsBody').innerHTML=DATA.stars.map(r=>`
    <tr class="row-good"><td>${r[0]}</td><td>${catBadge(r[1])}</td><td class="num">${fmt(r[2])}</td><td class="num">${fmt(r[3])}</td><td class="num" style="color:var(--green);font-weight:600">${r[4].toFixed(1)}%</td></tr>`).join('');

  document.getElementById('lowMBody').innerHTML=DATA.lowM.map(r=>`
    <tr class="row-alert"><td>${r[0]}</td><td>${catBadge(r[1])}</td><td class="num">${fmt(r[2])}</td><td class="num" style="color:var(--red);font-weight:600">${r[3].toFixed(1)}%</td></tr>`).join('');

  document.getElementById('invBody').innerHTML=DATA.inv.map(r=>`
    <tr class="row-alert"><td>${r[0]}</td><td class="num">R$ ${r[1].toFixed(2)}</td><td class="num">R$ ${r[2].toFixed(2)}</td><td class="num" style="color:var(--red);font-weight:600">-R$ ${(r[1]-r[2]).toFixed(2)}</td><td><span class="badge b-crit">Corrigir agora</span></td></tr>`).join('');

  document.getElementById('critBody').innerHTML=DATA.crit.map(r=>`
    <tr class="row-alert"><td><div class="pname">${r[0]}</div></td><td>${catBadge(r[1])}</td><td class="num" style="color:var(--red);font-weight:600">${r[2]}</td><td class="num">${r[3]}</td><td class="num" style="color:var(--red);font-weight:600">${r[4]}</td><td><span class="badge b-crit">Contar urgente</span></td></tr>`).join('');
}

/* ---- REPOSIÇÃO ---- */
let rCatC, rUrgC;
function recalcular(){
  const lt=parseInt(document.getElementById('pLT').value)||5;
  const cob=parseInt(document.getElementById('pCob').value)||30;
  const saf=parseInt(document.getElementById('pSaf').value)||7;
  REP_CALC=REP_DATA.rows.filter(r=>!r.desc.toUpperCase().includes('GRANEL')).map(r=>{
    const ideal=r.venda_dia*(lt+cob+saf);
    const pp=r.venda_dia*(lt+saf);
    const qtd=Math.max(0,ideal-r.estoque);
    const val=qtd*((r.qtd_repor>0?r.valor_repor/r.qtd_repor:0));
    let urg='Normal';
    if(r.estoque<=0) urg='Crítico';
    else if(r.estoque<r.venda_dia*saf) urg='Urgente';
    else if(r.estoque<=pp) urg='Pedir já';
    return {...r,ponto_pedido:Math.round(pp*10)/10,estoque_ideal:Math.round(ideal*10)/10,qtd_repor:Math.round(qtd*10)/10,valor_repor:Math.round(val*100)/100,urgencia:urg};
  }).filter(r=>r.qtd_repor>0).sort((a,b)=>b.valor_repor-a.valor_repor);
  updateRepKPIs(); renderRep(); updateRepCharts(); if(document.getElementById("tab-compras").classList.contains("active")) pcRender();
}

function updateRepKPIs(){
  const total=REP_CALC.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.valor_repor,0);
  document.getElementById('rKpiValor').textContent='R$ '+Math.round(total).toLocaleString('pt-BR');
  document.getElementById('rKpiCrit').textContent=REP_CALC.filter(r=>r.urgencia==='Crítico').length;
  document.getElementById('rKpiUrg').textContent=REP_CALC.filter(r=>r.urgencia==='Urgente').length;
  document.getElementById('rKpiPj').textContent=REP_CALC.filter(r=>r.urgencia==='Pedir já').length;
  document.getElementById('rKpiTotal').textContent=REP_CALC.length+' itens';
}

function renderRep(){
  const cat=document.getElementById('rfCat').value;
  const urg=document.getElementById('rfUrg').value;
  const q=document.getElementById('rfBusca').value.toLowerCase();
  const rows=REP_CALC.filter(r=>(!cat||r.cat===cat)&&(!urg||r.urgencia===urg)&&(!q||r.desc.toLowerCase().includes(q)));
  document.getElementById('rCount').textContent=rows.length+' produtos — R$ '+Math.round(rows.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.valor_repor,0)).toLocaleString('pt-BR');
  const ord={'Crítico':0,'Urgente':1,'Pedir já':2,'Normal':3};
  rows.sort((a,b)=>(ord[a.urgencia]||3)-(ord[b.urgencia]||3)||(b.valor_repor-a.valor_repor));
  document.getElementById('repBody').innerHTML=rows.map(r=>`
    <tr class="${r.urgencia==='Crítico'?'row-alert':r.urgencia==='Urgente'?'row-warn':''}">
      <td>${urgBadge(r.urgencia)}</td>
      <td style="max-width:220px;font-size:12px">${r.desc}</td>
      <td>${catBadge(r.cat)}</td>
      <td class="num" style="color:${r.estoque<=0?'#a32020':r.estoque<=r.ponto_pedido?'#7a4f00':'inherit'};font-weight:${r.estoque<=0?700:400}">${r.estoque}</td>
      <td class="num" style="color:var(--t3)">${r.ponto_pedido}</td>
      <td class="num"><span style="color:${cobC(r.cobertura_dias)};font-weight:600">${r.cobertura_dias<=0?'Sem estoque':r.cobertura_dias+'d'}</span></td>
      <td class="num" style="color:var(--t3)">${r.venda_dia}</td>
      <td class="num">${r.venda_mensal}</td>
      <td class="num" style="color:var(--blue);font-weight:600">${r.qtd_repor} ${r.unidade==='Quilograma'?'kg':'un'}</td>
      <td class="num" style="color:var(--green);font-weight:600">${r.valor_repor>=1000?'R$ '+Math.round(r.valor_repor).toLocaleString('pt-BR'):'R$ '+r.valor_repor.toFixed(2)}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
}

function updateRepCharts(){
  const catM={};
  REP_CALC.forEach(r=>{ catM[r.cat]=(catM[r.cat]||0)+r.valor_repor; });
  const cats=Object.entries(catM).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,7);
  if(rCatC) rCatC.destroy();
  rCatC=new Chart(document.getElementById('rCatChart'),{
    type:'bar',
    data:{labels:cats.map(c=>c[0]),datasets:[{data:cats.map(c=>Math.round(c[1])),backgroundColor:COLORS,borderRadius:4}]},
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{ticks:{font:{size:9},color:tc},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{callback:v=>'R$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K',font:{size:9},color:tc},grid:{color:gc}}}}
  });
  const urgM={'Crítico':0,'Urgente':0,'Pedir já':0,'Normal':0};
  REP_CALC.forEach(r=>{ urgM[r.urgencia]=(urgM[r.urgencia]||0)+r.valor_repor; });
  const urgC={'Crítico':'#a32020','Urgente':'#c87f00','Pedir já':'#d48000','Normal':'#1a4f8a'};
  document.getElementById('rUrgLeg').innerHTML=Object.keys(urgM).map(u=>`<span><i style="background:${urgC[u]}"></i>${u}: R$ ${Math.round(urgM[u]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')}</span>`).join('');
  if(rUrgC) rUrgC.destroy();
  rUrgC=new Chart(document.getElementById('rUrgChart'),{
    type:'doughnut',
    data:{labels:Object.keys(urgM),datasets:[{data:Object.values(urgM).map(v=>Math.round(v)),backgroundColor:Object.keys(urgM).map(u=>urgC[u]),borderWidth:2,borderColor:'#fff'}]},
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}}}
  });
}

function exportRep(){
  const cat=document.getElementById('rfCat').value;
  const urg=document.getElementById('rfUrg').value;
  const rows=REP_CALC.filter(r=>(!cat||r.cat===cat)&&(!urg||r.urgencia===urg));
  const h='Urgência;Produto;Categoria;Subcategoria;Unidade;Estoque atual;Ponto de pedido;Cobertura (dias);Venda/dia;Venda/mês;Qtd a comprar;Valor estimado (R$)';
  const b=rows.map(r=>[r.urgencia,'"'+r.desc+'"',r.cat,r.subcat,r.unidade,r.estoque,r.ponto_pedido,r.cobertura_dias,r.venda_dia,r.venda_mensal,r.qtd_repor,r.valor_repor.toFixed(2)].join(';')).join('\n');
  const blob=new Blob(['\uFEFF'+h+'\n'+b],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'});
  const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download='reposicao_armazem_'+(new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10))+'.csv'; a.click();
}

var _mInited = false;
var _mCharts = {};

function initMensalOnce(){
  if(_mInited) return;
  _mInited = true;
  renderMKpis();
  renderMCompar();
  renderMPopulateSel();
  renderMTop();
  // Defer charts to ensure canvas has dimensions
  setTimeout(function(){ renderMCharts(); }, 400);
}

function reinitMensal(){
  _mInited = false;
  // Destroy all existing charts
  Object.keys(_mCharts).forEach(function(k){ mDestroyChart(k); });
  initMensalOnce();
}

function fmt(n){ return 'R$ ' + Math.round(n).toLocaleString('pt-BR'); }
function fmtK(n){ return 'R$ ' + (n/1000).toFixed(1) + 'K'; }

function renderMKpis(){
  document.getElementById('mkFat').textContent = fmtK(MD.total_fat);
  document.getElementById('mkLucro').textContent = fmtK(MD.total_lucro);
  document.getElementById('mkMedia').textContent = fmtK(MD.media_fat);
  document.getElementById('mkMargMedia').textContent = MD.marg_media + '%';
  document.getElementById('mkMelhor').textContent = MD.melhor_mes;
  document.getElementById('mkMelhorSub').textContent = fmtK(MD.melhor_fat);
  document.getElementById('mkPior').textContent = MD.pior_mes;
  document.getElementById('mkPiorSub').textContent = fmtK(MD.pior_fat);
  document.getElementById('mkMargMes').textContent = MD.melhor_marg_mes;
  document.getElementById('mkMargSub').textContent = MD.melhor_marg + '%';
  var cr = MD.crescimento;
  document.getElementById('mkCresc').textContent = (cr>=0?'+':'') + cr + '%';
  document.getElementById('mkCresc').style.color = cr>=0 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--red)';
}

function mDestroyChart(id){
  if(_mCharts[id]){ try{ _mCharts[id].destroy(); }catch(e){} delete _mCharts[id]; }
}

function renderMCharts(){
  var tc='#9e9d96', gc='rgba(0,0,0,0.05)';
  var COLS=['#1a4f8a','#2d6a2d','#7f77dd','#c87f00','#a32020','#1a6e6e','#7a3a70'];
  var LABS = MD.meses;

  // 1. Fat + Lucro (com real vs projetado se mês parcial)
  mDestroyChart('fat');
  var fatDatasets;
  if(MD.mes_parcial){
    // Separar real e projetado para o último mês
    var fatReal = MD.fat.slice();
    var fatProj = MD.fat.map(function(){ return null; });
    var lucReal = MD.lucro.slice();
    var lucProj = MD.lucro.map(function(){ return null; });
    var ui2 = MD.fat.length-1;
    fatReal[ui2] = MD.fat_real || fatReal[ui2]; // valor real sem projeção
    fatProj[ui2] = MD.fat[ui2];                 // valor projetado
    lucReal[ui2] = MD.lucro_real || lucReal[ui2];
    lucProj[ui2] = MD.lucro[ui2];
    fatDatasets = [
      { label: 'Faturamento', data: fatReal, backgroundColor: 'rgba(26,79,138,0.75)', borderRadius: 4, order: 2 },
      { label: 'Lucro bruto', data: lucReal, backgroundColor: 'rgba(45,106,45,0.85)', borderRadius: 4, order: 1 },
      { label: 'Fat. projetado', data: fatProj, backgroundColor: 'rgba(26,79,138,0.30)', borderRadius: 4, order: 4,
        borderColor: 'rgba(26,79,138,0.75)', borderWidth: 2, borderDash: [4,4] },
      { label: 'Lucro projetado', data: lucProj, backgroundColor: 'rgba(45,106,45,0.30)', borderRadius: 4, order: 3,
        borderColor: 'rgba(45,106,45,0.85)', borderWidth: 2 }
    ];
  } else {
    fatDatasets = [
      { label: 'Faturamento', data: MD.fat, backgroundColor: 'rgba(26,79,138,0.75)', borderRadius: 4, order: 2 },
      { label: 'Lucro bruto', data: MD.lucro, backgroundColor: 'rgba(45,106,45,0.85)', borderRadius: 4, order: 1 }
    ];
  }
  _mCharts['fat'] = new Chart(document.getElementById('cMFat'), {
    type: 'bar',
    data: { labels: LABS, datasets: fatDatasets },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: tc, font: { size: 11 }, boxWidth: 12 } },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: function(c){ return c.dataset.label + ': ' + fmt(c.raw); } } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 } }, grid: { display: false } },
        y: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 }, callback: function(v){ return fmtK(v); } }, grid: { color: gc } }
      }
    }
  });

  // 2. Margem
  mDestroyChart('marg');
  _mCharts['marg'] = new Chart(document.getElementById('cMMarg'), {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      labels: LABS,
      datasets: [{
        label: 'Margem %', data: MD.margem,
        borderColor: '#2d6a2d', backgroundColor: 'rgba(45,106,45,.12)',
        borderWidth: 2.5, pointRadius: 5, pointBackgroundColor: '#2d6a2d',
        fill: true, tension: 0.35
      }]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: { legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: function(c){ return 'Margem: ' + c.raw + '%'; } } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 } }, grid: { display: false } },
        y: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 }, callback: function(v){ return v + '%'; } }, grid: { color: gc }, min: 18, max: 35 }
      }
    }
  });

  // 3. Qtd
  mDestroyChart('qtd');
  _mCharts['qtd'] = new Chart(document.getElementById('cMQtd'), {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      labels: LABS,
      datasets: [{
        label: 'Itens', data: MD.qtd,
        borderColor: '#7f77dd', backgroundColor: 'rgba(127,119,221,.12)',
        borderWidth: 2.5, pointRadius: 5, pointBackgroundColor: '#7f77dd',
        fill: true, tension: 0.35
      }]
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: { legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: function(c){ return 'Itens: ' + Math.round(c.raw).toLocaleString('pt-BR'); } } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 } }, grid: { display: false } },
        y: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 }, callback: function(v){ return Math.round(v/1000) + 'K'; } }, grid: { color: gc } }
      }
    }
  });

  // 4. Cat stacked
  var cats = Object.keys(MD.cat_fat);
  mDestroyChart('cat');
  _mCharts['cat'] = new Chart(document.getElementById('cMCat'), {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels: LABS,
      datasets: cats.map(function(c,i){ return { label: c, data: MD.cat_fat[c], backgroundColor: COLS[i%COLS.length], borderRadius: 2 }; })
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: { legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: function(c){ return c.dataset.label + ': ' + fmtK(c.raw); } } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 } }, grid: { display: false } },
        y: { stacked: true, ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 }, callback: function(v){ return fmtK(v); } }, grid: { color: gc } }
      }
    }
  });
  var leg = document.getElementById('mCatLeg');
  leg.innerHTML = '';
  cats.forEach(function(c,i){ leg.innerHTML += '<span><i style="background:'+COLS[i]+'"></i>'+c+'</span>'; });

  // 5. Cat margem lines
  mDestroyChart('catmarg');
  _mCharts['catmarg'] = new Chart(document.getElementById('cMCatMarg'), {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
      labels: LABS,
      datasets: cats.map(function(c,i){ return {
        label: c, data: MD.cat_marg[c],
        borderColor: COLS[i%COLS.length], backgroundColor: 'transparent',
        borderWidth: 2, pointRadius: 3, tension: 0.3
      }; })
    },
    options: {
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: { legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: function(c){ return c.dataset.label + ': ' + c.raw + '%'; } } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 } }, grid: { display: false } },
        y: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 10 }, callback: function(v){ return v + '%'; } }, grid: { color: gc } }
      }
    }
  });
  var leg2 = document.getElementById('mCatMargLeg');
  leg2.innerHTML = '';
  cats.forEach(function(c,i){ leg2.innerHTML += '<span><i style="background:'+COLS[i]+'"></i>'+c+'</span>'; });

  // 6. Subcat horizontal bar
  mDestroyChart('subcat');
  _mCharts['subcat'] = new Chart(document.getElementById('cMSubcat'), {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels: MD.subcat.map(function(r){ return r[0]+'/'+r[1]; }),
      datasets: [{
        label: 'Faturamento', data: MD.subcat.map(function(r){ return r[2]; }),
        backgroundColor: MD.subcat.map(function(_,i){ return COLS[i%COLS.length]; }), borderRadius: 3
      }]
    },
    options: {
      indexAxis: 'y',
      responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: { legend: { display: false },
        tooltip: { callbacks: { label: function(c){ return 'Fat: ' + fmt(c.raw) + ' | Marg: ' + MD.subcat[c.dataIndex][4] + '%'; } } }
      },
      scales: {
        x: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 9 }, callback: function(v){ return fmtK(v); } }, grid: { color: gc } },
        y: { ticks: { color: tc, font: { size: 9 } }, grid: { display: false } }
      }
    }
  });
}

function renderMPopulateSel(){
  var sel = document.getElementById('mMesSel');
  sel.innerHTML = '';
  MD.meses.forEach(function(m){ sel.innerHTML += '<option value="' + m + '">' + m + '</option>'; });
  sel.value = MD.meses[MD.meses.length-1];
}

function renderMTop(){
  var mes = document.getElementById('mMesSel').value;
  var rows = MD.top5[mes] || [];
  var catCols = {'CAO':'#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','CÃO':'#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','GATO':'#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d','PASSAROS':'#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','MEDICAMENTOS':'#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','CAVALO':'#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  document.getElementById('mTopBody').innerHTML = rows.length ? rows.map(function(r,i){
    var cs = catCols[r[1]] || '#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64';
    var marg = r[2]>0 ? (r[3]/r[2]*100).toFixed(1) : '—';
    var mc = parseFloat(marg)>=35 ? 'var(--green)' : parseFloat(marg)<15 ? 'var(--red)' : 'inherit';
    return '<tr><td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">'+(i+1)+'</td><td style="font-weight:500;font-size:12px">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:'+cs+'">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num">'+fmt(r[2])+'</td><td class="num">'+fmt(r[3])+'</td><td class="num" style="color:'+mc+';font-weight:600">'+marg+'%</td></tr>';
  }).join('') : '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;padding:18px;color:var(--text3)">Sem dados.</td></tr>';
}

function renderMCompar(){
  var acum = 0;
  var html = '';
  MD.meses.forEach(function(m, i){
    acum += MD.fat[i];
    var prev = i > 0 ? MD.fat[i-1] : null;
    var diff = prev ? ((MD.fat[i]-prev)/prev*100) : null;
    var ds = diff === null ? '—' : (diff >= 0 ? '<span style="color:var(--green);font-weight:600">▲ '+diff.toFixed(1)+'%</span>' : '<span style="color:var(--red);font-weight:600">▼ '+Math.abs(diff).toFixed(1)+'%</span>');
    var rc = diff !== null && diff < -5 ? 'row-alert' : diff !== null && diff > 5 ? 'row-good' : '';
    var mc = MD.margem[i] >= 28 ? 'var(--green)' : MD.margem[i] < 24 ? 'var(--red)' : 'inherit';
    html += '<tr class="' + rc + '">';
    html += '<td><strong>' + m + '</strong></td>';
    html += '<td class="num">' + fmt(MD.fat[i]) + '</td>';
    html += '<td class="num">' + fmt(MD.lucro[i]) + '</td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="color:' + mc + ';font-weight:600">' + MD.margem[i] + '%</td>';
    html += '<td class="num">' + Math.round(MD.qtd[i]).toLocaleString('pt-BR') + '</td>';
    html += '<td class="num">' + MD.skus[i] + '</td>';
    html += '<td class="num">' + ds + '</td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="color:var(--blue)">' + fmt(acum) + '</td>';
    html += '</tr>';
  });
  document.getElementById('mComparBody').innerHTML = html;
}
