REPRODUÇÃO 15 ML","MEDICAMENTOS","PASSAROS",-1.0,18.0,-13.0],["COCHO MADEIRA PP COM DIVISÓRIA","PASSAROS","ACESSORIOS",-7.0,5.0,-17.5],["RAÇÃO SACA MAGNUS CAT CARNE RECHEADA 20KG","GATO","RAÇÕES",-0.1,168.0,-21.91],["RAÇÃO SACA MAGNUS CAT CASTRADO CARNE 20KG","GATO","RAÇÕES",-0.2,175.0,-26.46],["RAÇÃO SACA MAGNUS CAT ADULTO CARNE 20 KG","GATO","RAÇÕES",-0.2,169.0,-30.81],["RAÇÃO SACA MAGNUS TODO DIA 20 KG","CÃO","RAÇÕES",-2.3,122.0,-204.25],["RAÇÃO SACA ORIGENS SENIOR MEDIOS E GRANDE CARNE 15","CÃO","RAÇÃO",-2.1,138.0,-237.68]]};
var _c1=null,_c2=null;

function esShowEstoque(){
  esRC(); esCatT(); esRI();
  // exact same pattern as working test
  var w1=document.getElementById('esW1');
  var w2=document.getElementById('esW2');
  if(!w1||!w2){setTimeout(esShowEstoque,300);return;}
  w1.innerHTML='<canvas></canvas>';
  w2.innerHTML='<canvas></canvas>';
  var e1=w1.querySelector('canvas');
  var e2=w2.querySelector('canvas');
  var COLS=['#1a4f8a','#2d6a2d','#7f77dd','#c87f00','#a32020','#1a6e6e'];
  if(_c1)try{_c1.destroy();}catch(x){}
  _c1=new Chart(e1,{type:'bar',data:{labels:ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),datasets:[{data:ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[1];}),backgroundColor:COLS,borderRadius:4}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return 'R$ '+Math.round(c.raw).toLocaleString('pt-BR');}}}},scales:{x:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return 'R$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K';}},grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)'}}}}});
  if(_c2)try{_c2.destroy();}catch(x){}
  _c2=new Chart(e2,{type:'bar',data:{labels:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),datasets:[{data:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[3];}),backgroundColor:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[3]>=5?'#2d6a2d':r[3]>=2?'#c87f00':'#a32020';}),borderRadius:4}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return c.raw+'x ao ano';}}}},scales:{x:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return v+'x';}},grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)'}}}}});
}

function esRC(){
  var urg=document.getElementById('esUF').value;
  var rows=ED.crit_list.filter(function(r){return !urg||r[6]===urg;});
  var cs={'CÃO':'#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','GATO':'#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d','PASSAROS':'#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','MEDICAMENTOS':'#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','CAVALO':'#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  var us={'Crítico':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020','Urgente':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','Atenção':'background:#fff3dc;color:#8a5000'};
  document.getElementById('esCB').innerHTML=rows.map(function(r){return '<tr class="'+(r[6]==='Crítico'?'row-alert':r[6]==='Urgente'?'row-warn':'')+'"><td style="font-size:12px;font-weight:500">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:'+(cs[r[1]]||'#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64')+'">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[2]<0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+';font-weight:'+(r[2]<0?700:400)+'">'+r[2]+'</td><td class="num">'+r[3]+'</td><td class="num">'+(r[4]==='Negativo'?'<span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:700">Negativo</span>':r[4]+'d')+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[5]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="'+(us[r[6]]||'')+'">'+r[6]+'</span></td></tr>';}).join('');
}

function esCatT(){
  document.getElementById('esCatB').innerHTML=ED.giro_list.map(function(r){
    var g=r[3],gc=g>=5?'var(--green)':g>=2?'var(--amber)':'var(--red)';
    var s=g>=5?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green)">Ótimo</span>':g>=2?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--amber-bg);color:var(--amber)">Regular</span>':'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red)">Baixo</span>';
    var cr=ED.cat_list.find(function(c){return c[0]===r[0];})||[r[0],0,0,0,0];
    return '<tr><td><strong>'+r[0]+'</strong></td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[1]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[2]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num" style="color:'+gc+';font-weight:600">'+g+'x</td><td class="num" style="color:'+(cr[3]>0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+'">'+(cr[3]||0)+'</td><td class="num">'+(cr[4]||0)+'</td><td>'+s+'</td></tr>';
  }).join('');
}

function esRI(){
  var q=(document.getElementById('esIQ')||{}).value||'';
  var rows=ED.inat_list.filter(function(r){return !q||r[0].toLowerCase().indexOf(q.toLowerCase())>=0;});
  document.getElementById('esIB').innerHTML=rows.map(function(r){return '<tr style="'+(r[3]>0?'background:#fff8f0':'')+'"><td style="font-size:12px">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[3]<0?'var(--red)':r[3]>0?'var(--amber)':'var(--text3)')+'">'+r[3]+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+r[4].toFixed(2)+'</td><td class="num">'+(r[5]!==0?'R$ '+r[5].toFixed(2):'—')+'</td></tr>';}).join('');
}

function esDrop(e){e.preventDefault();var f=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(f)esProc(f);}
function esFile2(i){var f=i.files[0];if(f)esProc(f);i.value='';}
function esProc(file){
  var r=new FileReader();
  r.onload=function(e){try{var wb=XLSX.read(e.target.result,{type:'array'});esParse(XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]],{defval:''}));}catch(err){esM('Erro: '+err.message,'e');}};
  r.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
}
function esParse(rows){
  if(!rows.length)return;
  var keys=Object.keys(rows[0]);
  function fc(cc){for(var i=0;i<cc.length;i++)for(var j=0;j<keys.length;j++)if(keys[j].toLowerCase().indexOf(cc[i].toLowerCase())>=0)return keys[j];return null;}
  var cQ=fc(['quantidade em estoque']),cC=fc(['custo']),cCat=fc(['categoria']),cMin=fc(['estoque minimo']),cAt=fc(['ativo']),cDesc=fc(['descri','nome','produto']),cPV=fc(['preço venda varejo','preco venda','venda varejo','preço de venda']);
  if(!cQ)return;

  // Atualizar estoque no REP_DATA cruzando por nome do produto
  if(cDesc){
    var estoqueMap={};
    rows.forEach(function(r){
      var ativo=cAt?String(r[cAt]).toLowerCase()!=='não':true;
      if(!ativo) return;
      var nome=String(r[cDesc]).toUpperCase().trim();
      var qty=parseFloat(r[cQ])||0;
      estoqueMap[nome]=qty;
    });
    window._estoqueMap = estoqueMap; // salvar globalmente para aba Saídas
    REP_DATA.rows.forEach(function(r){
      var key=r.desc.toUpperCase().trim();
      if(estoqueMap.hasOwnProperty(key)){
        r.estoque=estoqueMap[key];
        r.cobertura_dias=r.venda_dia>0?Math.round(r.estoque/r.venda_dia*10)/10:(r.estoque>0?999:0);
      }
    });
  }

  var tv=0,neg=0,zer=0,min=0,at=0,in2=0,cm={};
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var ativo=cAt?String(r[cAt]).toLowerCase()!=='não':true;
    if(!ativo){in2++;return;}at++;
    var qty=parseFloat(r[cQ])||0,custo=cC?parseFloat(r[cC])||0:0,minV=cMin?parseFloat(r[cMin])||0:0,cat=cCat?String(r[cCat]):'';
    tv+=qty*custo;if(qty<0)neg++;if(qty===0)zer++;if(qty<minV&&minV>0)min++;
    if(cat){if(!cm[cat])cm[cat]={val:0,p:0,neg:0,zer:0};cm[cat].val+=qty*custo;cm[cat].p++;if(qty<0)cm[cat].neg++;if(qty===0)cm[cat].zer++;}
  });
  ED.valor_total=Math.round(tv);ED.negativos=neg;ED.zerados=zer;ED.abaixo_min=min;ED.total_ativos=at;ED.total_inativos=in2;
  ED.cat_list=Object.entries(cm).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].val-a[1].val;}).filter(function(e){return e[1].val>0;}).map(function(e){return[e[0],Math.round(e[1].val),e[1].p,e[1].neg,e[1].zer];});
  document.getElementById('esV').textContent='R$ '+Math.round(tv).toLocaleString('pt-BR');
  document.getElementById('esN').textContent=neg;document.getElementById('esZ').textContent=zer;
  document.getElementById('esM').textContent=min;document.getElementById('esA').textContent=at;
  document.getElementById('esI').textContent=in2;document.getElementById('esIN').textContent=in2;

  // Reconstruir crit_list com dados atualizados (sem inativos)
  var prodMap={};
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var ativo=cAt?String(r[cAt]).toLowerCase()!=='não':true;
    if(!ativo) return;
    var nome=cDesc?String(r[cDesc]).toUpperCase().trim():'';
    if(nome) prodMap[nome]=true;
  });
  ED.negativos=neg; ED.zerados=zer; ED.abaixo_min=min; ED.total_ativos=at; ED.total_inativos=in2;
  // Reconstruir inat_list com produtos inativos do arquivo
  var newInat=[];
  var cSubcat=fc(['subcategoria']);
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var ativo=cAt?String(r[cAt]).toLowerCase()!=='não':true;
    if(ativo) return; // só inativos
    var nome=cDesc?String(r[cDesc]).toUpperCase().trim():'';
    var cat=cCat?String(r[cCat]):'';
    var subcat=cSubcat?String(r[cSubcat]):'';
    var qty=parseFloat(r[cQ])||0;
    var custo=cC?parseFloat(r[cC])||0:0;
    if(qty>0) newInat.push([nome,cat,subcat,qty,custo,Math.round(qty*custo*100)/100]);
  });
  newInat.sort(function(a,b){return b[5]-a[5];});
  ED.inat_list=newInat;

  ED.crit_list = ED.crit_list.filter(function(r){ return prodMap[r[0].toUpperCase().trim()]!==undefined?true:true; });
  // Reconstruir crit_list a partir do REP_DATA atualizado
  var urgOrder={'Crítico':0,'Urgente':1,'Atenção':2};
  var newCrit=[];
  REP_DATA.rows.forEach(function(r){
    if(r.desc.toUpperCase().indexOf('GRANEL')>=0) return;
    var cob=r.venda_dia>0?r.estoque/r.venda_dia:r.estoque>0?999:0;
    var urg=cob<=0?'Crítico':cob<7?'Urgente':cob<15?'Atenção':null;
    if(urg) newCrit.push([r.desc,r.cat,r.estoque,r.venda_dia,Math.round(cob*10)/10,r.valor_repor,urg]);
  });
  newCrit.sort(function(a,b){return (urgOrder[a[6]]||9)-(urgOrder[b[6]]||9);});
  ED.crit_list=newCrit;

  // Atualizar KPIs da Visão Geral
  var elNeg=document.getElementById('vgNegativos');
  var elInat=document.getElementById('vgInativos');
  var elInatSub=document.getElementById('vgInativosSub');
  if(elNeg) elNeg.textContent=neg;
  if(elInat) elInat.textContent=in2;
  if(elInatSub && ED.total_ativos>0) elInatSub.textContent=Math.round(in2/(in2+at)*100)+'% do catálogo';

  // Preço invertido - só ativos com custo > preço de venda
  if(cC && cPV){
    var inv=0;
    rows.forEach(function(r){
      var ativo=cAt?String(r[cAt]).toLowerCase()!=='não':true;
      if(!ativo) return;
      var custo=parseFloat(r[cC])||0;
      var pvenda=parseFloat(r[cPV])||0;
      if(custo>0 && pvenda>0 && custo>pvenda) inv++;
    });
    var elInv=document.getElementById('vgInvertido');
    if(elInv) elInv.textContent=inv;
  }

  if(_c1)try{_c1.destroy();}catch(x){}_c1=null;
  if(_c2)try{_c2.destroy();}catch(x){}_c2=null;
  esShowEstoque();
  recalcular();
  atualizarTudo('estoque');
  esM(at+' ativos importados — todas as abas atualizadas.','s');
}
function esM(msg,type){
  var el=document.getElementById('esMsg');
  var c={i:'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',s:'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',e:'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  el.style.cssText='display:block;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;'+(c[type]||c.i);el.textContent=msg;
  if(type==='s')setTimeout(function(){el.style.display='none';},3000);
}

/* ── MENSAL IMPORT ── */
function mHandleDrop(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  document.getElementById('mDrop').style.borderColor = '#b8d8b8';
  var file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
  if(file) mProcessFile(file);
}
function mHandleFile(input){
  var file = input.files[0];
  if(file) mProcessFile(file);
  input.value = '';
}
function mProcessFile(file){
  mShowMsg('Lendo arquivo...', 'info');
  var reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(e){
    try{
      var wb = XLSX.read(e.target.result, { type: 'array', cellDates: true });
      var rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]], { defval: '' });
      mParseRows(rows);
    } catch(err){ mShowMsg('Erro: ' + err.message, 'error'); }
  };
  reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
}
function mParseRows(rows){
  if(!rows.length){ mShowMsg('Arquivo vazio.', 'error'); return; }
  var keys = Object.keys(rows[0]);
  function fc(cands){ for(var i=0;i<cands.length;i++) for(var j=0;j<keys.length;j++) if(keys[j].toLowerCase().indexOf(cands[i].toLowerCase())>=0) return keys[j]; return null; }
  var cMes=fc(['mês','mes','month']), cCat=fc(['categoria']), cProd=fc(['produto','product']);
  var cFat=fc(['valor de vendas','faturamento']), cLuc=fc(['lucratividade','lucro']);
  var cQtd=fc(['qtd.vendida','qtd','quantidade']);
  if(!cMes||!cFat){ mShowMsg('Colunas Mês e Valor de Vendas não encontradas.','error'); return; }

  var byMes = {};
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var d = new Date(r[cMes]); if(isNaN(d)) return;
    var m = d.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{month:'short',year:'2-digit'}).replace('. ','/').replace('.','');
    m = m.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + m.slice(1);
    if(!byMes[m]) byMes[m] = {fat:0,luc:0,qtd:0,skus:new Set(),cats:{},catLuc:{},prods:{}};
    var fat=parseFloat(r[cFat])||0, luc=cLuc?parseFloat(r[cLuc])||0:0, qtd=cQtd?parseFloat(r[cQtd])||0:0;
    byMes[m].fat+=fat; byMes[m].luc+=luc; byMes[m].qtd+=qtd;
    if(cProd&&r[cProd]) byMes[m].skus.add(r[cProd]);
    if(cCat&&r[cCat]){byMes[m].cats[r[cCat]]=(byMes[m].cats[r[cCat]]||0)+fat; byMes[m].catLuc[r[cCat]]=(byMes[m].catLuc[r[cCat]]||0)+luc;}
    if(cProd&&r[cProd]){if(!byMes[m].prods[r[cProd]])byMes[m].prods[r[cProd]]={fat:0,luc:0,cat:r[cCat]||''};byMes[m].prods[r[cProd]].fat+=fat;byMes[m].prods[r[cProd]].luc+=luc;}
  });

  var meses = Object.keys(byMes);
  if(!meses.length){ mShowMsg('Nenhum dado válido.','error'); return; }

  MD.meses=meses; MD.fat=meses.map(function(m){return Math.round(byMes[m].fat);}); MD.lucro=meses.map(function(m){return Math.round(byMes[m].luc);});
  MD.margem=meses.map(function(m){return byMes[m].fat>0?Math.round(byMes[m].luc/byMes[m].fat*1000)/10:0;});
  MD.qtd=meses.map(function(m){return Math.round(byMes[m].qtd);}); MD.skus=meses.map(function(m){return byMes[m].skus.size;});
  var cats=['CÃO','GATO','PASSAROS','MEDICAMENTOS','CAVALO','PRAGAS'];
  cats.forEach(function(c){MD.cat_fat[c]=meses.map(function(m){return Math.round(byMes[m].cats[c]||0);}); MD.cat_marg[c]=meses.map(function(m){var f=byMes[m].cats[c]||0,l=byMes[m].catLuc[c]||0;return f>0?Math.round(l/f*1000)/10:0;});});
  MD.top5={};
  meses.forEach(function(m){var ps=Object.entries(byMes[m].prods).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].fat-a[1].fat;}).slice(0,5);MD.top5[m]=ps.map(function(p){return[p[0].substring(0,45),p[1].cat,Math.round(p[1].fat),Math.round(p[1].luc)];});});
  MD.total_fat=MD.fat.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0); MD.total_lucro=MD.lucro.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0);
  MD.media_fat=Math.round(MD.total_fat/meses.length); MD.marg_media=Math.round(MD.margem.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0)/meses.length*10)/10;
  var mi=MD.fat.indexOf(Math.max.apply(null,MD.fat)), pi=MD.fat.indexOf(Math.min.apply(null,MD.fat)), gi=MD.margem.indexOf(Math.max.apply(null,MD.margem));
  MD.melhor_mes=meses[mi]; MD.melhor_fat=MD.fat[mi]; MD.pior_mes=meses[pi]; MD.pior_fat=MD.fat[pi]; MD.melhor_marg_mes=meses[gi]; MD.melhor_marg=MD.margem[gi];
  // Crescimento: último mês vs mês anterior (não vs primeiro mês do período)
  var _ui = meses.length-1;
  var _fatUlt = MD.fat[_ui], _fatAnt = _ui>0 ? MD.fat[_ui-1] : MD.fat[0];
  MD.crescimento = _fatAnt>0 ? Math.round((_fatUlt-_fatAnt)/_fatAnt*1000)/10 : 0;
  MD.crescimento_label = meses[_ui-1]||'';

  // ── Detectar mês parcial ──
  // Pegar a data mais recente nos dados
  var dataMax = null;
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var d = new Date(r[cMes]);
    if(!isNaN(d) && (!dataMax || d > dataMax)) dataMax = d;
  });

  MD.mes_parcial = false;
  MD.parcial_aviso = '';

  if(dataMax){
    var hoje = new Date();
    var anoAtual = hoje.getFullYear(), mesAtual = hoje.getMonth();
    var anoMax = dataMax.getFullYear(), mesMax = dataMax.getMonth();

    // Se o último mês dos dados é o mês atual
    if(anoMax === anoAtual && mesMax === mesAtual){
      var diaHoje = hoje.getDate();
      var diasNoMes = new Date(anoAtual, mesAtual+1, 0).getDate();
      var fatorProj = diasNoMes / diaHoje;
      MD.mes_parcial = true;
      MD.parcial_dia = diaHoje;
      MD.parcial_dias_mes = diasNoMes;
      MD.parcial_fator = Math.round(fatorProj*100)/100;
      MD.parcial_aviso = 'Mês atual parcial (' + diaHoje + '/' + diasNoMes + ' dias) — último mês projetado para o mês completo (×' + MD.parcial_fator.toFixed(2) + ')';

      // Salvar valores reais antes de projetar
      var ui = meses.length - 1;
      MD.fat_real   = MD.fat[ui];
      MD.lucro_real = MD.lucro[ui];
      MD.qtd_real   = MD.qtd[ui];
      // Projetar o último mês para o mês completo
      MD.fat[ui]   = Math.round(MD.fat[ui]   * fatorProj);
      MD.lucro[ui] = Math.round(MD.lucro[ui] * fatorProj);
      MD.qtd[ui]   = Math.round(MD.qtd[ui]   * fatorProj);
      MD.margem[ui] = MD.fat[ui]>0 ? Math.round(MD.lucro[ui]/MD.fat[ui]*1000)/10 : 0;

      // Atualizar totais e médias com projeção
      MD.total_fat   = MD.fat.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0);
      MD.total_lucro = MD.lucro.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0);
      MD.media_fat   = Math.round(MD.total_fat/meses.length);
      MD.marg_media  = Math.round(MD.margem.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0)/meses.length*10)/10;
      var mi2=MD.fat.indexOf(Math.max.apply(null,MD.fat)), pi2=MD.fat.indexOf(Math.min.apply(null,MD.fat));
      MD.melhor_mes=meses[mi2]; MD.melhor_fat=MD.fat[mi2]; MD.pior_mes=meses[pi2]; MD.pior_fat=MD.fat[pi2];

      // Atualizar venda_dia e venda_mensal no REP_DATA com base nos dados do mês atual projetado
      var mesParcialKey = meses[ui];
      var prodVendas = byMes[mesParcialKey] ? byMes[mesParcialKey].prods : {};
      REP_DATA.rows.forEach(function(r){
        var key = r.desc.toUpperCase().trim();
        // Procurar produto pelo nome
        var match = null;
        Object.keys(prodVendas).forEach(function(pn){
          if(pn.toUpperCase().trim() === key) match = prodVendas[pn];
        });
        if(match){
          var vendaMensal = match.qtd ? Math.round(match.qtd * fatorProj * 10)/10 : r.venda_mensal;
          var vendaDia = Math.round(vendaMensal / diasNoMes * 100)/100;
          r.venda_mensal = vendaMensal;
          r.venda_dia = vendaDia;
        }
      });
    }
  }

  reinitMensal();
  renderMPopulateSel(); renderMTop(); renderMCompar();

  // Mostrar aviso de mês parcial
  var avisoEl = document.getElementById('mAvisoParcial');
  if(avisoEl){
    if(MD.mes_parcial){
      avisoEl.style.display='block';
      avisoEl.textContent='⚠️ ' + MD.parcial_aviso;
    } else {
      avisoEl.style.display='none';
    }
  }

  // Recalcular reposição com novos venda_dia
  if(MD.mes_parcial) recalcular();

  // Atualizar SV_DATA com dados de venda do arquivo importado
  SV_DATA.rows.forEach(function(svr){
    var key = svr.prod.toUpperCase().trim();
    var qtdTotal = 0, nMes = 0;
    SV_DATA.meses.forEach(function(m, mi){
      if(byMes[m] && byMes[m].prods){
        var found = null;
        Object.keys(byMes[m].prods).forEach(function(pn){
          if(pn.toUpperCase().trim()===key) found=byMes[m].prods[pn];
        });
        if(found){
          svr.ev[mi] = Math.round((found.qtd||0)*100)/100;
          qtdTotal += found.qtd||0;
          nMes++;
          svr.fat = Math.round(svr.fat); // manter
        }
      }
    });
  });

  atualizarTudo('vendas');

  var msg = MD.mes_parcial
    ? 'Importado — ' + meses.length + ' meses. ' + MD.parcial_aviso
    : 'Importado com sucesso — ' + meses.length + ' meses carregados!';
  mShowMsg(msg, MD.mes_parcial ? 'info' : 'success');
}
function mShowMsg(msg,type){
  var el=document.getElementById('mMsg');
  var c={info:'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',success:'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',error:'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  el.style.cssText='display:block;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;'+c[type]; el.textContent=msg;
  if(type==='success') setTimeout(function(){el.style.display='none';},3000);
}

var _esC1 = null, _esC2 = null;

function esInit(){
  esRenderKpis();
  esRenderCrit();
  esRenderCatTable();
  esRenderInat();
  // Build charts after a reliable delay
  setTimeout(esRenderCharts, 600);
}

function esRenderKpis(){
  document.getElementById('esV').textContent  = 'R$ '+Math.round(ED.valor_total).toLocaleString('pt-BR');
  document.getElementById('esN').textContent  = ED.negativos;
  document.getElementById('esZ').textContent  = ED.zerados;
  document.getElementById('esM').textContent  = ED.abaixo_min;
  document.getElementById('esR').textContent  = ED.ruptura_risco;
  document.getElementById('esA').textContent  = ED.total_ativos||'—';
  document.getElementById('esI').textContent  = ED.total_inativos||'—';
  document.getElementById('esInatN').textContent = ED.total_inativos||0;
}

function esRenderCharts(){
  var COLS=['#1a4f8a','#2d6a2d','#7f77dd','#c87f00','#a32020','#1a6e6e'];
  var tc='#9e9d96', gc='rgba(0,0,0,0.05)';

  var w1 = document.getElementById('esCatWrap');
  if(!w1){ setTimeout(esRenderCharts,300); return; }
  w1.innerHTML = '<canvas></canvas>';
  var el1 = w1.querySelector('canvas');
  if(_esC1) try{_esC1.destroy();}catch(e){}
  _esC1 = new Chart(el1, {
    type:'bar',
    data:{
      labels: ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),
      datasets:[{data:ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[1];}),backgroundColor:COLS,borderRadius:4}]
    },
    options:{
      responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
      plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return 'R$ '+Math.round(c.raw).toLocaleString('pt-BR');}}}},
      scales:{x:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return 'R$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K';}},grid:{color:gc}}}
    }
  });

  var w2 = document.getElementById('esGiroWrap');
  if(!w2) return;
  w2.innerHTML = '<canvas></canvas>';
  var el2 = w2.querySelector('canvas');
  if(_esC2) try{_esC2.destroy();}catch(e){}
  _esC2 = new Chart(el2, {
    type:'bar',
    data:{
      labels: ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),
      datasets:[{data:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[3];}),backgroundColor:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[3]>=5?'#2d6a2d':r[3]>=2?'#c87f00':'#a32020';}),borderRadius:4}]
    },
    options:{
      responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
      plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return c.raw+'x ao ano';}}}},
      scales:{x:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return v+'x';}},grid:{color:gc}}}
    }
  });
}

function esRenderCrit(){
  var urg = document.getElementById('esUrgFilt').value;
  var rows = ED.crit_list.filter(function(r){return !urg||r[6]===urg;});
  var cs = {'CÃO':'#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','GATO':'#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d','PASSAROS':'#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','MEDICAMENTOS':'#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','CAVALO':'#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  var us = {'Crítico':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020','Urgente':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','Atenção':'background:#fff3dc;color:#8a5000'};
  document.getElementById('esCritBody').innerHTML = rows.length ? rows.map(function(r){
    return '<tr class="'+(r[6]==='Crítico'?'row-alert':r[6]==='Urgente'?'row-warn':'')+'"><td style="font-size:12px;font-weight:500">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:'+(cs[r[1]]||'#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64')+'">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[2]<0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+';font-weight:'+(r[2]<0?700:400)+'">'+r[2]+'</td><td class="num">'+r[3]+'</td><td class="num">'+(r[4]==='Negativo'?'<span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:700">Negativo</span>':r[4]+'d')+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[5]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="'+(us[r[6]]||'')+'">'+r[6]+'</span></td></tr>';
  }).join('') : '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:18px;color:var(--text3)">Nenhum item neste filtro.</td></tr>';
}

function esRenderCatTable(){
  document.getElementById('esCatBody').innerHTML = ED.giro_list.map(function(r){
    var g=r[3], gc2=g>=5?'var(--green)':g>=2?'var(--amber)':'var(--red)';
    var saude=g>=5?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green)">Ótimo</span>':g>=2?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--amber-bg);color:var(--amber)">Regular</span>':'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red)">Baixo</span>';
    var cr=ED.cat_list.find(function(c){return c[0]===r[0];})||[r[0],0,0,0,0];
    return '<tr><td><strong>'+r[0]+'</strong></td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[1]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[2]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num" style="color:'+gc2+';font-weight:600">'+g+'x</td><td class="num" style="color:'+(cr[3]>0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+'">'+(cr[3]||0)+'</td><td class="num">'+(cr[4]||0)+'</td><td>'+saude+'</td></tr>';
  }).join('');
}

function esRenderInat(){
  var q=(document.getElementById('esInatQ')||{}).value||'';
  var rows=ED.inat_list.filter(function(r){return !q||r[0].toLowerCase().indexOf(q.toLowerCase())>=0||r[1].toLowerCase().indexOf(q.toLowerCase())>=0;});
  document.getElementById('esInatBody').innerHTML=rows.length?rows.map(function(r){
    return '<tr style="'+(r[3]>0?'background:#fff8f0':'')+'"><td style="font-size:12px">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[3]<0?'var(--red)':r[3]>0?'var(--amber)':'var(--text3)')+'">'+r[3]+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+r[4].toFixed(2)+'</td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[5]>0?'var(--amber)':'var(--text3)')+'">'+( r[5]!==0?'R$ '+r[5].toFixed(2):'—')+'</td></tr>';
  }).join(''):'<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;padding:18px;color:var(--text3)">Nenhum produto.</td></tr>';
}

/* IMPORT */
function esHandleDrop(e){e.preventDefault();var f=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(f)esProcessFile(f);}
function esHandleFile(input){var f=input.files[0];if(f)esProcessFile(f);input.value='';}
function esProcessFile(file){
  esShowMsg('Lendo...','info');
  var r=new FileReader();
  r.onload=function(e){
    try{var wb=XLSX.read(e.target.result,{type:'array'});esParseRows(XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]],{defval:''}));}
    catch(err){esShowMsg('Erro: '+err.message,'error');}
  };
  r.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
}
function esParseRows(rows){
  if(!rows.length){esShowMsg('Arquivo vazio.','error');return;}
  var keys=Object.keys(rows[0]);
  function fc(cc){for(var i=0;i<cc.length;i++)for(var j=0;j<keys.length;j++)if(keys[j].toLowerCase().indexOf(cc[i].toLowerCase())>=0)return keys[j];return null;}
  var cQ=fc(['quantidade em estoque','qtd.estoque']),cC=fc(['custo','preco de custo']),cCat=fc(['categoria']),cMin=fc(['estoque minimo']),cAt=fc(['ativo']);
  if(!cQ){esShowMsg('Coluna Quantidade em Estoque não encontrada.','error');return;}
  var tv=0,neg=0,zer=0,min=0,ativos=0,inativos=0,cm={};
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var ativo=cAt?String(r[cAt]).toLowerCase()!=='não':true;
    if(!ativo){inativos++;return;}
    ativos++;
    var qty=parseFloat(r[cQ])||0,custo=cC?parseFloat(r[cC])||0:0,minV=cMin?parseFloat(r[cMin])||0:0,cat=cCat?String(r[cCat]):'';
    tv+=qty*custo;if(qty<0)neg++;if(qty===0)zer++;if(qty<minV&&minV>0)min++;
    if(cat){if(!cm[cat])cm[cat]={val:0,p:0,neg:0,zer:0};cm[cat].val+=qty*custo;cm[cat].p++;if(qty<0)cm[cat].neg++;if(qty===0)cm[cat].zer++;}
  });
  ED.valor_total=Math.round(tv);ED.negativos=neg;ED.zerados=zer;ED.abaixo_min=min;ED.total_ativos=ativos;ED.total_inativos=inativos;
  ED.cat_list=Object.entries(cm).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].val-a[1].val;}).filter(function(e){return e[1].val>0;}).map(function(e){return[e[0],Math.round(e[1].val),e[1].p,e[1].neg,e[1].zer];});
  if(_esC1)try{_esC1.destroy();}catch(ex){}
  if(_esC2)try{_esC2.destroy();}catch(ex){}
  _esC1=null;_esC2=null;
  esInit();
  esShowMsg('Importado! '+ativos+' ativos, '+inativos+' inativos.','success');
}
function esShowMsg(msg,type){
  var el=document.getElementById('esMsg');
  var c={info:'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',success:'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',error:'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  el.style.cssText='display:block;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;'+c[type];el.textContent=msg;
  if(type==='success')setTimeout(function(){el.style.display='none';},3000);
}

/* ══ ESTOQUE ══ */
var var _c1=null,_c2=null;

function esShowEstoque(){
  esRC(); esCatT(); esRI();
  // exact same pattern as working test
  var w1=document.getElementById('esW1');
  var w2=document.getElementById('esW2');
  if(!w1||!w2){setTimeout(esShowEstoque,300);return;}
  w1.innerHTML='<canvas></canvas>';
  w2.innerHTML='<canvas></canvas>';
  var e1=w1.querySelector('canvas');
  var e2=w2.querySelector('canvas');
  var COLS=['#1a4f8a','#2d6a2d','#7f77dd','#c87f00','#a32020','#1a6e6e'];
  if(_c1)try{_c1.destroy();}catch(x){}
  _c1=new Chart(e1,{type:'bar',data:{labels:ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),datasets:[{data:ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[1];}),backgroundColor:COLS,borderRadius:4}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return 'R$ '+Math.round(c.raw).toLocaleString('pt-BR');}}}},scales:{x:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return 'R$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K';}},grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)'}}}}});
  if(_c2)try{_c2.destroy();}catch(x){}
  _c2=new Chart(e2,{type:'bar',data:{labels:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),datasets:[{data:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[3];}),backgroundColor:ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[3]>=5?'#2d6a2d':r[3]>=2?'#c87f00':'#a32020';}),borderRadius:4}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return c.raw+'x ao ano';}}}},scales:{x:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:'#9e9d96',font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return v+'x';}},grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)'}}}}});
}

function esRC(){
  var urg=document.getElementById('esUF').value;
  var rows=ED.crit_list.filter(function(r){return !urg||r[6]===urg;});
  var cs={'CÃO':'#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','GATO':'#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d','PASSAROS':'#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','MEDICAMENTOS':'#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','CAVALO':'#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  var us={'Crítico':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020','Urgente':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','Atenção':'background:#fff3dc;color:#8a5000'};
  document.getElementById('esCB').innerHTML=rows.map(function(r){return '<tr class="'+(r[6]==='Crítico'?'row-alert':r[6]==='Urgente'?'row-warn':'')+'"><td style="font-size:12px;font-weight:500">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:'+(cs[r[1]]||'#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64')+'">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[2]<0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+';font-weight:'+(r[2]<0?700:400)+'">'+r[2]+'</td><td class="num">'+r[3]+'</td><td class="num">'+(r[4]==='Negativo'?'<span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:700">Negativo</span>':r[4]+'d')+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[5]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="'+(us[r[6]]||'')+'">'+r[6]+'</span></td></tr>';}).join('');
}

function esCatT(){
  document.getElementById('esCatB').innerHTML=ED.giro_list.map(function(r){
    var g=r[3],gc=g>=5?'var(--green)':g>=2?'var(--amber)':'var(--red)';
    var s=g>=5?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green)">Ótimo</span>':g>=2?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--amber-bg);color:var(--amber)">Regular</span>':'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red)">Baixo</span>';
    var cr=ED.cat_list.find(function(c){return c[0]===r[0];})||[r[0],0,0,0,0];
    return '<tr><td><strong>'+r[0]+'</strong></td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[1]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[2]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num" style="color:'+gc+';font-weight:600">'+g+'x</td><td class="num" style="color:'+(cr[3]>0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+'">'+(cr[3]||0)+'</td><td class="num">'+(cr[4]||0)+'</td><td>'+s+'</td></tr>';
  }).join('');
}

function esRI(){
  var q=(document.getElementById('esIQ')||{}).value||'';
  var rows=ED.inat_list.filter(function(r){return !q||r[0].toLowerCase().indexOf(q.toLowerCase())>=0;});
  document.getElementById('esIB').innerHTML=rows.map(function(r){return '<tr style="'+(r[3]>0?'background:#fff8f0':'')+'"><td style="font-size:12px">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[3]<0?'var(--red)':r[3]>0?'var(--amber)':'var(--text3)')+'">'+r[3]+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+r[4].toFixed(2)+'</td><td class="num">'+(r[5]!==0?'R$ '+r[5].toFixed(2):'—')+'</td></tr>';}).join('');
}

function esDrop(e){e.preventDefault();var f=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(f)esProc(f);}
function esM(msg,type){
  var el=document.getElementById('esMsg');
  var c={i:'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',s:'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',e:'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  el.style.cssText='display:block;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;'+(c[type]||c.i);el.textContent=msg;
  if(type==='s')setTimeout(function(){el.style.display='none';},3000);
}

/* ── MENSAL IMPORT ── */
function mHandleDrop(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  document.getElementById('mDrop').style.borderColor = '#b8d8b8';
  var file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
  if(file) mProcessFile(file);
}
function mHandleFile(input){
  var file = input.files[0];
  if(file) mProcessFile(file);
  input.value = '';
}
function mProcessFile(file){
  mShowMsg('Lendo arquivo...', 'info');
  var reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(e){
    try{
      var wb = XLSX.read(e.target.result, { type: 'array', cellDates: true });
      var rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]], { defval: '' });
      mParseRows(rows);
    } catch(err){ mShowMsg('Erro: ' + err.message, 'error'); }
  };
  reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
}

function mShowMsg(msg,type){
  var el=document.getElementById('mMsg');
  var c={info:'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',success:'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',error:'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  el.style.cssText='display:block;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;'+c[type]; el.textContent=msg;
  if(type==='success') setTimeout(function(){el.style.display='none';},3000);
}

var _esInited = false;
var _esCharts = {};

function initEstoqueOnce(){
  if(_esInited) return;
  _esInited = true;
  esRenderKpis();
  setTimeout(function(){ esRenderCharts(); }, 50);
  esRenderCrit();
  esRenderCatTable();
  esRenderInat();
}

function esRenderKpis(){
  document.getElementById('esKpiValor').textContent = 'R$ ' + Math.round(ED.valor_total).toLocaleString('pt-BR');
  document.getElementById('esKpiNeg').textContent = ED.negativos;
  document.getElementById('esKpiZer').textContent = ED.zerados;
  document.getElementById('esKpiMin').textContent = ED.abaixo_min;
  document.getElementById('esKpiRup').textContent = ED.ruptura_risco;
  document.getElementById('esKpiAtivos').textContent = ED.total_ativos || '—';
  document.getElementById('esKpiInat').textContent = ED.total_inativos || '—';
  document.getElementById('esInatCount').textContent = ED.total_inativos || 0;
}

function esRenderCharts(){
  var tc='#9e9d96', gc='rgba(0,0,0,0.05)';
  var COLS=['#1a4f8a','#2d6a2d','#7f77dd','#c87f00','#a32020','#1a6e6e','#7a3a70','#3a5a7a'];
  
  // Verify canvas exists and is visible
  var catEl = document.getElementById('esCatChart');
  var giroEl = document.getElementById('esGiroChart');
  if(!catEl || !giroEl) return;

  if(_esCharts['cat']) try{_esCharts['cat'].destroy();}catch(e){}
  _esCharts['cat'] = new Chart(catEl,{
    type:'bar',
    data:{
      labels: ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),
      datasets:[{
        label:'Valor estoque', data: ED.cat_list.map(function(r){return r[1];}),
        backgroundColor: COLS, borderRadius:4
      }]
    },
    options:{responsive:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return 'R$ '+Math.round(c.raw).toLocaleString('pt-BR');}}}},
      scales:{x:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return 'R$'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K';}},grid:{color:gc}}}}
  });

  if(_esCharts['giro']) try{_esCharts['giro'].destroy();}catch(e){}
  _esCharts['giro'] = new Chart(giroEl,{
    type:'bar',
    data:{
      labels: ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[0];}),
      datasets:[{
        label:'Giro', data: ED.giro_list.map(function(r){return r[3];}),
        backgroundColor: ED.giro_list.map(function(r,i){return r[3]>=5?'#2d6a2d':r[3]>=2?'#c87f00':'#a32020';}), borderRadius:4
      }]
    },
    options:{responsive:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:function(c){return 'Giro: '+c.raw+'x ao ano';}}}},
      scales:{x:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9}},grid:{display:false}},y:{ticks:{color:tc,font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return v+'x';}},grid:{color:gc}}}}
  });
}

function esRenderCrit(){
  var urg = document.getElementById('esFilterUrg').value;
  var rows = ED.crit_list.filter(function(r){return !urg || r[6]===urg;});
  var catCols={'CÃO':'#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','GATO':'#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d','PASSAROS':'#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','MEDICAMENTOS':'#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','CAVALO':'#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  var urgStyle={'Crítico':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020','Urgente':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00','Atenção':'background:#fff3dc;color:#8a5000'};
  document.getElementById('esCritBody').innerHTML = rows.length ? rows.map(function(r){
    var cs = catCols[r[1]] || '#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64';
    var us = urgStyle[r[6]] || '';
    var cobTxt = r[4]==='Negativo' ? '<span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:700">Negativo</span>' : r[4]+'d';
    return '<tr class="'+(r[6]==='Crítico'?'row-alert':r[6]==='Urgente'?'row-warn':'')+'"><td style="font-weight:500;font-size:12px">'+r[0]+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:'+cs+'">'+r[1]+'</span></td><td class="num" style="color:'+(r[2]<0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+';font-weight:'+(r[2]<0?700:400)+'">'+r[2]+'</td><td class="num">'+r[3]+'</td><td class="num">'+cobTxt+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[5]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td><span class="badge" style="'+us+'">'+r[6]+'</span></td></tr>';
  }).join('') : '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:18px;color:var(--text3)">Nenhum item neste filtro.</td></tr>';
}

function esRenderCatTable(){
  document.getElementById('esCatBody').innerHTML = ED.giro_list.map(function(r){
    var giro = r[3];
    var gc2 = giro>=5?'var(--green)':giro>=2?'var(--amber)':'var(--red)';
    var saude = giro>=5?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--green-bg);color:var(--green)">Ótimo</span>':giro>=2?'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--amber-bg);color:var(--amber)">Regular</span>':'<span class="badge" style="background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red)">Baixo</span>';
    var catRow = ED.cat_list.find(function(c){return c[0]===r[0];}) || [r[0],0,0,0,0];
    return '<tr><td><strong>'+r[0]+'</strong></td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[1]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num">R$ '+Math.round(r[2]).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td><td class="num" style="color:'+gc2+';font-weight:600">'+giro+'x</td><td class="num" style="color:'+(catRow[3]>0?'var(--red)':'inherit')+'">'+(catRow[3]||0)+'</td><td class="num">'+(catRow[4]||0)+'</td><td>'+saude+'</td></tr>';
  }).join('');
}

/* IMPORT ESTOQUE */
function esHandleDrop(e){e.preventDefault();document.getElementById('esDrop').style.borderColor='#b8d8b8';var f=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(f)esProcessFile(f);}
function esHandleFile(input){var f=input.files[0];if(f)esProcessFile(f);input.value='';}
function esProcessFile(file){
  esShowMsg('Lendo arquivo...','info');
  var reader=new FileReader();
  reader.onload=function(e){
    try{
      var wb=XLSX.read(e.target.result,{type:'array'});
      var rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]],{defval:''});
      esParseRows(rows);
    }catch(err){esShowMsg('Erro: '+err.message,'error');}
  };
  reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
}
function esParseRows(rows){
  if(!rows.length){esShowMsg('Arquivo vazio.','error');return;}
  var keys=Object.keys(rows[0]);
  function fc(cands){for(var i=0;i<cands.length;i++)for(var j=0;j<keys.length;j++)if(keys[j].toLowerCase().indexOf(cands[i].toLowerCase())>=0)return keys[j];return null;}
  var cDesc=fc(['descri','nome','produto']),cCat=fc(['categoria']),cQty=fc(['quantidade em estoque','qtd.estoque','estoque']),cMin=fc(['estoque minimo','minimo']),cCusto=fc(['custo','preco de custo']);
  if(!cDesc||!cQty){esShowMsg('Colunas Descrição e Quantidade em Estoque não encontradas.','error');return;}

  var totalVal=0,neg=0,zer=0,min=0;
  var catMap={};
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var qty=parseFloat(r[cQty])||0, custo=cCusto?parseFloat(r[cCusto])||0:0;
    var minVal=cMin?parseFloat(r[cMin])||0:0, cat=cCat?String(r[cCat]):'';
    totalVal+=qty*custo;
    if(qty<0)neg++;
    if(qty===0)zer++;
    if(qty<minVal&&minVal>0)min++;
    if(cat){if(!catMap[cat])catMap[cat]={val:0,prods:0,neg:0,zer:0};catMap[cat].val+=qty*custo;catMap[cat].prods++;if(qty<0)catMap[cat].neg++;if(qty===0)catMap[cat].zer++;}
  });
  ED.valor_total=Math.round(totalVal);ED.negativos=neg;ED.zerados=zer;ED.abaixo_min=min;
  ED.cat_list=Object.entries(catMap).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].val-a[1].val;}).filter(function(e){return e[1].val>0;}).map(function(e){return[e[0],Math.round(e[1].val),e[1].prods,e[1].neg,e[1].zer];});
  _esInited=false;
  initEstoqueOnce();
  esShowMsg('Estoque atualizado! '+rows.length+' produtos importados.','success');
}
function esRenderInat(){
  var q = document.getElementById('esInatBusca') ? document.getElementById('esInatBusca').value.toLowerCase() : '';
  var rows = ED.inat_list.filter(function(r){ return !q || r[0].toLowerCase().indexOf(q) >= 0 || r[1].toLowerCase().indexOf(q) >= 0; });
  document.getElementById('esInatBody').innerHTML = rows.length ? rows.map(function(r){
    var hasStock = r[3] > 0;
    return '<tr style="' + (hasStock ? 'background:#fff8f0' : '') + '"><td style="font-size:12px">' + r[0] + '</td><td><span class="badge" style="background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64">' + r[1] + '</span></td><td style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">' + r[2] + '</td><td class="num" style="color:' + (r[3] < 0 ? 'var(--red)' : r[3] > 0 ? 'var(--amber)' : 'var(--text3)') + ';font-weight:' + (r[3] !== 0 ? 600 : 400) + '">' + r[3] + '</td><td class="num">R$ ' + r[4].toFixed(2) + '</td><td class="num" style="color:' + (r[5] > 0 ? 'var(--amber)' : 'var(--text3)') + '">' + (r[5] !== 0 ? 'R$ ' + r[5].toFixed(2) : '—') + '</td></tr>';
  }).join('') : '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;padding:18px;color:var(--text3)">Nenhum produto inativo encontrado.</td></tr>';
}

function esShowMsg(msg,type){
  var el=document.getElementById('esMsg');
  var c={info:'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',success:'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',error:'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020'};
  el.style.cssText='display:block;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;'+c[type];el.textContent=msg;
  if(type==='success')setTimeout(function(){el.style.display='none';},3000);
}

function pcGetFornecedor(desc){
  return FORN_MAP[desc.toUpperCase().trim()] || 'SEM FORNECEDOR';
}

function pcInit(){
  pcRender();
}

function pcBuildData(){
  // Lê do REP_CALC (dinâmico, atualizado quando estoque é importado)
  var source = typeof REP_CALC !== 'undefined' ? REP_CALC : [];
  // Filtrar granel
  var rows = source.filter(function(r){ return r.desc.toUpperCase().indexOf('GRANEL') < 0 && r.qtd_repor > 0; });

  // Agrupar por fornecedor
  var byForn = {};
  rows.forEach(function(r){
    var forn = pcGetFornecedor(r.desc);
    if(!byForn[forn]) byForn[forn] = [];
    byForn[forn].push({
      fornecedor: forn,
      produto: r.desc,
      categoria: r.cat,
      urgencia: r.urgencia,
      estoque: r.estoque,
      qtd_repor: r.qtd_repor,
      valor_est: r.valor_repor,
      cobertura: r.cobertura_dias,
      venda_dia: r.venda_dia,
      venda_mensal: r.venda_mensal,
    });
  });

  var urgOrd = {'Crítico':0,'Urgente':1,'Pedir já':2,'Normal':3};
  var result = Object.keys(byForn).map(function(forn){
    var itens = byForn[forn].sort(function(a,b){ return (urgOrd[a.urgencia]||9)-(urgOrd[b.urgencia]||9); });
    return {
      fornecedor: forn,
      total: itens.reduce(function(s,r){ return s+r.valor_est; }, 0),
      n_itens: itens.length,
      criticos: itens.filter(function(r){ return r.urgencia==='Crítico'; }).length,
      urgentes: itens.filter(function(r){ return r.urgencia==='Urgente'; }).length,
      itens: itens
    };
  });

  // Ordenar: SEM FORNECEDOR por último, demais por valor desc
  result.sort(function(a,b){
    if(a.fornecedor==='SEM FORNECEDOR') return 1;
    if(b.fornecedor==='SEM FORNECEDOR') return -1;
    return b.total - a.total;
  });
  return result;
}

function pcRender(){
  var data = pcBuildData();

  // KPIs
  var totalVal   = data.reduce(function(s,f){ return s+f.total; }, 0);
  var totalItens = data.reduce(function(s,f){ return s+f.n_itens; }, 0);
  var totalCrit  = data.reduce(function(s,f){ return s+f.criticos; }, 0);
  var totalUrg   = data.reduce(function(s,f){ return s+f.urgentes; }, 0);
  var totalForn  = data.filter(function(f){ return f.fornecedor!=='SEM FORNECEDOR'; }).length;
  document.getElementById('pcKpiGrid').innerHTML = [
    ['red',   '💰 Valor total a comprar', 'R$ '+Math.round(totalVal).toLocaleString('pt-BR'), 'Estimativa de custo'],
    ['amber', '🏪 Fornecedores',           ''+totalForn,   'Com pedidos ativos'],
    ['red',   '🔴 Itens críticos',          ''+totalCrit,   'Comprar hoje'],
    ['amber', '🟡 Urgentes',                ''+totalUrg,    'Esta semana'],
    ['blue',  '📦 Total de itens',          ''+totalItens,  'Em '+data.length+' fornecedores'],
  ].map(function(k){
    return '<div class="kpi '+k[0]+'"><div class="lbl">'+k[1]+'</div><div class="val">'+k[2]+'</div><div class="sub">'+k[3]+'</div></div>';
  }).join('');

  // Popular select de fornecedores
  var sel = document.getElementById('pcFiltForn');
  var prev = sel.value;
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Todos os fornecedores</option>';
  data.forEach(function(f){
    var o = document.createElement('option');
    o.value = f.fornecedor; o.textContent = f.fornecedor;
    if(f.fornecedor === prev) o.selected = true;
    sel.appendChild(o);
  });

  // Filtros
  var filtForn = document.getElementById('pcFiltForn').value;
  var filtUrg  = document.getElementById('pcFiltUrg').value;
  var filtCat  = document.getElementById('pcFiltCat').value;
  var busca    = document.getElementById('pcBusca').value.toLowerCase();

  var urgStyle = {
    'Crítico':  'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020',
    'Urgente':  'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00',
    'Pedir já': 'background:#fff3e0;color:#8a4a00',
    'Normal':   'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a'
  };
  var catStyle = {
    'CÃO':          'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',
    'GATO':         'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',
    'PASSAROS':     'background:#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a',
    'MEDICAMENTOS': 'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00',
    'CAVALO':       'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020',
    'PRAGAS':       'background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64'
  };

  var visItens = 0, visVal = 0, html = '';

  data.forEach(function(f){
    if(filtForn && f.fornecedor !== filtForn) return;
    var itens = f.itens.filter(function(r){
      return (!filtUrg || r.urgencia === filtUrg)
          && (!filtCat  || r.categoria === filtCat)
          && (!busca    || r.produto.toLowerCase().indexOf(busca) >= 0);
    });
    if(!itens.length) return;

    var fTotal = itens.reduce(function(s,r){ return s+r.valor_est; }, 0);
    var fCrit  = itens.filter(function(r){ return r.urgencia==='Crítico'; }).length;
    var fUrg   = itens.filter(function(r){ return r.urgencia==='Urgente'; }).length;
    visItens += itens.length;
    visVal   += fTotal;

    var isSem = f.fornecedor === 'SEM FORNECEDOR';
    html += '<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px;padding:0;overflow:hidden">';
    // Header fornecedor
    html += '<div style="background:'+(isSem?'#fff3e0':'#f0f7f0')+';border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">';
    html += '<span style="font-size:16px">'+(isSem?'⚠️':'🏪')+'</span>';
    html += '<div>';
    html += '<div style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px">'+(isSem?'<span style="color:#c87f00">SEM FORNECEDOR CADASTRADO</span>':f.fornecedor)+'</div>';
    var sub = itens.length+' ite'+(itens.length>1?'ns':'m');
    if(fCrit) sub += ' &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:600">'+fCrit+' crítico'+(fCrit>1?'s':'')+'</span>';
    if(fUrg)  sub += ' &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span style="color:#7a4f00;font-weight:600">'+fUrg+' urgente'+(fUrg>1?'s':'')+'</span>';
    html += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--t2);margin-top:2px">'+sub+'</div>';
    html += '</div></div>';
    html += '<div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:'+(isSem?'#c87f00':'var(--green)')+'">R$ '+Math.round(fTotal).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</div>';
    html += '</div>';
    // Tabela
    html += '<div style="overflow:auto"><table><thead><tr>';
    html += '<th>Urgência</th><th>Produto</th><th>Cat.</th>';
    html += '<th class="num">Estoque</th><th class="num">Qtd. comprar</th>';
    html += '<th class="num">Venda/dia</th><th class="num">Venda/mês</th>';
    html += '<th class="num">Cobertura</th><th class="num" style="color:var(--green)">Valor est.</th>';
    html += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
    itens.forEach(function(r){
      var rowCls = r.urgencia==='Crítico'?'row-alert':r.urgencia==='Urgente'?'row-warn':'';
      var cobTxt = r.cobertura<=0 ? '<span style="color:#a32020;font-weight:700">Zerado/Neg.</span>' : r.cobertura+'d';
      html += '<tr class="'+rowCls+'">';
      html += '<td><span class="badge" style="'+(urgStyle[r.urgencia]||'')+'">'+r.urgencia+'</span></td>';
      html += '<td style="font-size:12px;font-weight:500;max-width:240px">'+r.produto+'</td>';
      html += '<td><span class="badge" style="'+(catStyle[r.categoria]||'background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64')+'">'+r.categoria+'</span></td>';
      html += '<td class="num" style="color:'+(r.estoque<0?'#a32020':'inherit')+';font-weight:'+(r.estoque<0?700:400)+'">'+r.estoque+'</td>';
      html += '<td class="num" style="color:var(--blue);font-weight:600">'+r.qtd_repor+' un</td>';
      html += '<td class="num" style="color:var(--t2)">'+r.venda_dia+'</td>';
      html += '<td class="num">'+r.venda_mensal+'</td>';
      html += '<td class="num">'+cobTxt+'</td>';
      html += '<td class="num" style="color:var(--green);font-weight:600">R$ '+(r.valor_est>=1000?Math.round(r.valor_est).toLocaleString('pt-BR'):r.valor_est.toFixed(2))+'</td>';
      html += '</tr>';
    });
    html += '</tbody></table></div></div>';
  });

  if(!html) html = '<div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--t3)">Nenhum item encontrado para os filtros selecionados.</div>';
  document.getElementById('pcCards').innerHTML = html;
  document.getElementById('pcCount').textContent = visItens+' itens — R$ '+Math.round(visVal).toLocaleString('pt-BR');
}

function pcExport(){
  var data = pcBuildData();
  var filtForn = document.getElementById('pcFiltForn').value;
  var filtUrg  = document.getElementById('pcFiltUrg').value;
  var filtCat  = document.getElementById('pcFiltCat').value;
  var busca    = document.getElementById('pcBusca').value.toLowerCase();
  var rows = [];
  data.forEach(function(f){
    if(filtForn && f.fornecedor !== filtForn) return;
    f.itens.forEach(function(r){
      if(filtUrg && r.urgencia !== filtUrg) return;
      if(filtCat && r.categoria !== filtCat) return;
      if(busca && r.produto.toLowerCase().indexOf(busca)<0) return;
      rows.push([f.fornecedor,r.urgencia,r.produto,r.categoria,r.estoque,r.qtd_repor,r.venda_dia,r.venda_mensal,r.cobertura,r.valor_est.toFixed(2)]);
    });
  });
  var h = 'Fornecedor;Urgencia;Produto;Categoria;Estoque;Qtd.Comprar;Venda.dia;Venda.mes;Cobertura.d;Valor.Est.R$';
  var b = rows.map(function(r){
    return r.map(function(v){ return '"'+(v+'').replace(/"/g,'\"')+'"'; }).join(';');
  }).join('\n');
  var blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF'+h+'\n'+b],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'});
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download = 'plano_compras_'+(new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10))+'.csv';
  a.click();
}


/* ══ SALVAR DASHBOARD ══ */
function salvarDashboard(){
  var blob = new Blob([document.documentElement.outerHTML], {type:'text/html;charset=utf-8'});
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  var hoje = new Date();
  var data = hoje.getFullYear()+'-'+(String(hoje.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'))+'-'+(String(hoje.getDate()).padStart(2,'0'));
  a.download = 'dashboard_armazem_' + data + '.html';
  a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
}

var _svInited = false;

function svInit(){
  if(_svInited) return;
  _svInited = true;

  // Popular select de meses
  var sel = document.getElementById('svMesFilt');
  SV_DATA.meses.forEach(function(m){
    var o = document.createElement('option');
    o.value = m;
    o.textContent = m.replace('-','/'). replace('2025','25').replace('2026','26');
    sel.appendChild(o);
  });

  // KPIs globais
  var byFat = SV_DATA.rows.slice().sort(function(a,b){return b.fat-a.fat;})[0];
  var byQtd = SV_DATA.rows.slice().sort(function(a,b){return b.qtd-a.qtd;})[0];
  var byMarg = SV_DATA.rows.filter(function(r){return r.fat>1000;}).sort(function(a,b){return b.marg-a.marg;})[0];
  document.getElementById('svKfat').textContent = 'R$ '+Math.round(byFat.fat/1000)+'K';
  document.getElementById('svKfatSub').textContent = byFat.prod.substring(0,40);
  document.getElementById('svKqtd').textContent = Math.round(byQtd.qtd).toLocaleString('pt-BR');
  document.getElementById('svKqtdSub').textContent = byQtd.prod.substring(0,40);
  document.getElementById('svKmarg').textContent = byMarg.marg+'%';
  document.getElementById('svKmargSub').textContent = byMarg.prod.substring(0,40);

  svRender();
}

function svSparkline(ev, w, h){
  var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  canvas.width = w; canvas.height = h;
  var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  var max = Math.max.apply(null, ev);
  var min = Math.min.apply(null, ev);
  var range = max - min || 1;
  var pts = ev.map(function(v,i){
    return {x: i/(ev.length-1)*(w-4)+2, y: h-2-(v-min)/range*(h-4)};
  });
  // Área
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(pts[0].x, h);
  pts.forEach(function(p){ ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y); });
  ctx.lineTo(pts[pts.length-1].x, h);
  ctx.closePath();
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(26,79,138,0.12)';
  ctx.fill();
  // Linha
  ctx.beginPath();
  pts.forEach(function(p,i){ i===0?ctx.moveTo(p.x,p.y):ctx.lineTo(p.x,p.y); });
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#1a4f8a';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
  ctx.stroke();
  // Último ponto destacado
  var last = pts[pts.length-1];
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(last.x, last.y, 3, 0, Math.PI*2);
  ctx.fillStyle = '#1a4f8a';
  ctx.fill();
  return canvas.toDataURL();
}

function svRender(){
  var busca  = document.getElementById('svBusca').value.toLowerCase().trim();
  var cat    = document.getElementById('svCat').value;
  var ord    = document.getElementById('svOrd').value;
  var mesFlt = document.getElementById('svMesFilt').value;
  var mesIdx = mesFlt ? SV_DATA.meses.indexOf(mesFlt) : -1;

  // Filtrar
  var rows = SV_DATA.rows.filter(function(r){
    if(cat && r.cat !== cat) return false;
    if(busca && r.prod.toLowerCase().indexOf(busca)<0) return false;
    if(mesFlt && r.ev[mesIdx]===0) return false;
    return true;
  });

  // Ordenar
  var ord_fn = {
    fat:   function(a,b){return b.fat-a.fat;},
    qtd:   function(a,b){return b.qtd-a.qtd;},
    marg:  function(a,b){return b.marg-a.marg;},
    lucro: function(a,b){return b.lucro-a.lucro;},
    az:    function(a,b){return a.prod.localeCompare(b.prod);}
  };
  rows.sort(ord_fn[ord]||ord_fn.fat);

  document.getElementById('svKcount').textContent = rows.length;

  var catStyle = {
    'CÃO':'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a',
    'GATO':'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',
    'PASSAROS':'background:#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a',
    'MEDICAMENTOS':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00',
    'CAVALO':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020',
    'PRAGAS':'background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64'
  };

  var html = '';
  var limit = 200; // renderizar no máx 200 linhas para performance
  var shown = Math.min(rows.length, limit);

  rows.slice(0, limit).forEach(function(r, i){
    var qtdExib = mesFlt && mesIdx>=0 ? r.ev[mesIdx] : r.qtd;
    var qtdLabel = mesFlt && mesIdx>=0
      ? qtdExib.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{maximumFractionDigits:2})
      : qtdExib.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{maximumFractionDigits:2});
    var spark = svSparkline(r.ev, 100, 28);
    var margColor = r.marg>=30?'#2d6a2d':r.marg>=20?'#1a4f8a':r.marg>=10?'#c87f00':'#a32020';
    html += '<tr style="cursor:pointer" onclick="svDetalhe('+i+')" title="Clique para ver detalhes">';
    html += '<td style="color:var(--t3);font-size:11px">'+(i+1)+'</td>';
    html += '<td style="font-size:12px;font-weight:500;max-width:260px">'+r.prod+'</td>';
    html += '<td><span class="badge" style="'+(catStyle[r.cat]||'background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64')+'">'+r.cat+'</span></td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="font-weight:600">'+qtdLabel+'</td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="color:var(--t2)">'+r.qtd_mes_med+'</td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="font-weight:600">R$ '+Math.round(r.fat).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="color:#2d6a2d">R$ '+Math.round(r.lucro).toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="color:'+margColor+';font-weight:600">'+r.marg+'%</td>';
    html += '<td class="num">R$ '+r.pm.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2})+'</td>';
    var estTxt = r.estoque===null||r.estoque===undefined ? '<span style="color:var(--t3)">—</span>' : r.estoque;
    var estColor = r.estoque<0?'color:#a32020;font-weight:700':r.estoque===0?'color:#c87f00':'color:var(--text)';
    html += '<td class="num" style="'+estColor+'">'+estTxt+'</td>';
    html += '<td class="num" style="color:var(--t2)">'+r.n_mes+'</td>';
    html += '<td class="num"><img src="'+spark+'" width="100" height="28" style="vertical-align:middle"></td>';
    html += '</tr>';
  });

  if(rows.length > limit){
    html += '<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:12px;color:var(--t3);font-size:12px">'+
      'Mostrando '+limit+' de '+rows.length+' produtos. Refine a busca para ver mais.</td></tr>';
  }

  document.getElementById('svBody').innerHTML = html || '<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--t3)">Nenhum produto encontrado.</td></tr>';
  document.getElementById('svDetalhe').style.display = 'none';

  // Guardar rows filtradas para detalhe
  window._svRows = rows;
}

function svDetalhe(idx){
  var r = window._svRows[idx];
  if(!r) return;
  var el = document.getElementById('svDetalhe');
  el.style.display = 'block';
  var meses = SV_DATA.meses;
  var catStyle = {
    'CÃO':'background:#e8f0fb;color:#1a4f8a','GATO':'background:#eaf2ea;color:#2d6a2d',
    'PASSAROS':'background:#eeecfb;color:#4a3a9a','MEDICAMENTOS':'background:#fef3dc;color:#7a4f00',
    'CAVALO':'background:#fceaea;color:#a32020','PRAGAS':'background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64'
  };
  var primeira = r.ev.slice(0,6).reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0)/6;
  var segunda  = r.ev.slice(-6).reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0)/6;
  var trend = primeira>0 ? Math.round((segunda-primeira)/primeira*100) : 0;
  var trendColor = trend>0?'#2d6a2d':'#a32020';
  var trendLbl = (trend>0?'+':'')+trend+'% vs 1º semestre';
  var maxV = Math.max.apply(null, r.ev);
  var evPos = r.ev.filter(function(v){return v>0;});
  var minV = evPos.length ? Math.min.apply(null, evPos) : 0;
  var melhorIdx = r.ev.indexOf(maxV);
  var piorIdx   = r.ev.indexOf(minV);

  var h = '';
  h += '<div class="card" style="border-left:4px solid #1a4f8a">';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px">';
  h += '<div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px">'+r.prod+'</div>';
  h += '<span class="badge" style="'+(catStyle[r.cat]||'background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64')+'">'+r.cat+'</span>';
  h += ' <span class="badge" style="background:#f0efe9;color:#6b6a64">'+r.subcat+'</span>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<button onclick="document.getElementById(\'svDetalhe\').style.display=\'none\'" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--t2);font-size:12px">✕ Fechar</button>';
  h += '</div>';

  var estLbl = (r.estoque===null||r.estoque===undefined) ? '—' : String(r.estoque);
  var estColor2 = (r.estoque<0)?'#a32020':(r.estoque===0)?'#c87f00':'#2d6a2d';
  var metricas = [
    ['Faturamento 12m', 'R$ '+Math.round(r.fat).toLocaleString('pt-BR'), '#1a4f8a'],
    ['Qtd. total', r.qtd.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{maximumFractionDigits:2}), '#1a4f8a'],
    ['Lucro total', 'R$ '+Math.round(r.lucro).toLocaleString('pt-BR'), '#2d6a2d'],
    ['Margem média', r.marg+'%', r.marg>=25?'#2d6a2d':r.marg>=15?'#c87f00':'#a32020'],
    ['Preço médio', 'R$ '+r.pm.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{minimumFractionDigits:2}), '#444'],
    ['Estoque atual', estLbl, estColor2],
    ['Qtd. méd/mês', String(r.qtd_mes_med), '#7f77dd'],
    ['Meses com venda', r.n_mes+'/13', '#444'],
    ['Tendência', trendLbl, trendColor]
  ];
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-bottom:18px">';
  metricas.forEach(function(m){
    h += '<div style="background:var(--surface2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px">';
    h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:4px">'+m[0]+'</div>';
    h += '<div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:'+m[2]+'">'+m[1]+'</div>';
    h += '</div>';
  });
  h += '</div>';

  h += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--t2);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Histórico mensal</div>';
  h += '<div style="overflow:auto"><table><thead><tr><th>Mês</th><th class="num">Qtd. vendida</th><th class="num">Faturamento est.</th><th class="num">vs mês ant.</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
  r.ev.forEach(function(v,i){
    var ant = i>0 ? r.ev[i-1] : null;
    var vp = (ant!==null && ant>0) ? Math.round((v-ant)/ant*100) : null;
    var vpTxt = vp===null ? '—' : (vp>0 ? '<span style="color:#2d6a2d">▲ '+vp+'%</span>' : '<span style="color:#a32020">▼ '+Math.abs(vp)+'%</span>');
    var isMelhor = (i===melhorIdx);
    var isPior   = (i===piorIdx && minV<maxV);
    var rowBg = isMelhor ? 'background:#eaf2ea' : isPior ? 'background:#fceaea' : '';
    var fatEst = Math.round(v * r.pm);
    h += '<tr style="'+rowBg+'">';
    h += '<td style="font-weight:'+(isMelhor||isPior?700:400)+'">'+meses[i].replace('-','/')+(isMelhor?' 🏆':'')+(isPior?' 📉':'')+'</td>';
    h += '<td class="num" style="font-weight:600">'+v.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{maximumFractionDigits:2})+'</td>';
    h += '<td class="num" style="color:var(--t2)">R$ '+fatEst.toLocaleString('pt-BR')+'</td>';
    h += '<td class="num">'+vpTxt+'</td>';
    h += '</tr>';
  });
  h += '</tbody></table></div></div>';
  el.innerHTML = h;
  el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'nearest'});
}

function svExport(){
  var busca  = document.getElementById('svBusca').value.toLowerCase().trim();
  var cat    = document.getElementById('svCat').value;
  var mesFlt = document.getElementById('svMesFilt').value;
  var mesIdx = mesFlt ? SV_DATA.meses.indexOf(mesFlt) : -1;
  var rows = (window._svRows || SV_DATA.rows);
  var h = 'Produto;Categoria;Subcategoria;Qtd.Total;Qtd.Media.Mes;Faturamento;Lucro;Margem%;Preco.Medio;Meses.Ativo';
  SV_DATA.meses.forEach(function(m){ h += ';'+m; });
  var b = rows.map(function(r){
    var base = [r.prod,r.cat,r.subcat,r.qtd,r.qtd_mes_med,r.fat.toFixed(2),r.lucro.toFixed(2),r.marg,r.pm,r.n_mes];
    return base.concat(r.ev).map(function(v){ return '"'+(v+'').replace(/"/g,'\\"')+'"'; }).join(';');
  }).join('\n');
  var blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF'+h+'\n'+b],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'});
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download = 'saidas_produtos_'+(new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10))+'.csv';
  a.click();
}


/* ══ ATUALIZAÇÃO GLOBAL ══ */
function atualizarTudo(origem){
  // Atualiza estoque na aba Saídas
  svAtualizarEstoque();

  // Atualiza venda_dia no REP_DATA a partir de SV_DATA (se vendas foram importadas)
  if(origem === 'vendas'){
    REP_DATA.rows.forEach(function(r){
      var key = r.desc.toUpperCase().trim();
      var sv = null;
      for(var i=0; i<SV_DATA.rows.length; i++){
        if(SV_DATA.rows[i].prod.toUpperCase().trim() === key){ sv = SV_DATA.rows[i]; break; }
      }
      if(sv){
        r.venda_mensal = sv.qtd_mes_med;
        r.venda_dia    = Math.round(sv.qtd_mes_med/30*100)/100;
      }
    });
    recalcular();
    if(window._svInited) svRender();
  }

  // Atualiza aba Saídas se estoque foi importado
  if(origem === 'estoque'){
    if(window._svInited) svRender();
    if(window._pcInited) pcRender();
  }
}

function svAtualizarEstoque(){
  // Mapear estoque atual do ED (já atualizado pelo esParse)
  // ED não tem lista direta; usamos estoqueMap global se existir
  if(window._estoqueMap){
    SV_DATA.rows.forEach(function(r){
      var key = r.prod.toUpperCase().trim();
      if(window._estoqueMap.hasOwnProperty(key)){
        r.estoque = window._estoqueMap[key];
      }
    });
  }
}

</script>

</body></html>
